    masjidId    String
-   eventName   String

+   title       String

-    
+   type        String   // prayer, education, community, youth, etc.
+   createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
+   updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
+   
    masjid      Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])
+ 
+   @@index([masjidId])
  }

_**Agent**_

I've updated the Event model to match the structure from your React component with some improvements:

1. Changed `id` from `Int` to `String` with `@default(cuid())` to match the pattern used in other models
2. Renamed `eventName` to `title` to match the component
3. Renamed `eventDate` to `date` for consistency
4. Added `time` field as a String to store time ranges like "13:30 - 14:30"
5. Added `type` field for categorizing events (prayer, education, community, youth)
6. Added `createdAt` and `updatedAt` timestamps for better record keeping
7. Added an index on `masjidId` for better query performance
8. Maintained the relationship with the Masjid model

The schema now properly reflects the event structure from your React component while following the database best practices and maintaining consistency with the rest of your schema.

Would you like me to make any adjustments to this schema?

{
  "codeResults": [
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n// Save generated prayer times to database\nexport async function saveMonthlyPrayerTimes(masjidId: string, prayerTimes: any[]) {\n  try {\n    // First delete existing prayer times for this month to avoid duplicates\n    const firstDate = new Date(prayerTimes[0].date)\n    const lastDate = new Date(prayerTimes[prayerTimes.length - 1].date)\n\n    await prisma.prayerTime.deleteMany({\n      where: {\n        masjidId,\n        date: {\n          gte: firstDate,\n          lte: lastDate,\n        },\n      },\n    })\n\n    // Now insert the new prayer times\n    const createdTimes = await Promise.all(\n      prayerTimes.map(async (pt) =\u003e {\n        const date = new Date(pt.date)\n\n        // Parse time strings to Date objects\n        const parseTimeString = (timeStr: string, baseDate: Date) =\u003e {\n          const [time, period] = timeStr.split(\" \")\n          const [hours, minutes] = time.split(\":\").map(Number)\n\n          let hour = hours\n          if (period === \"PM\" \u0026\u0026 hours \u003c 12) hour += 12\n          if (period === \"AM\" \u0026\u0026 hours === 12) hour = 0\n\n          const newDate = new Date(baseDate)\n          newDate.setHours(hour, minutes, 0, 0)\n          return newDate\n        }\n\n        return prisma.prayerTime.create({\n          data: {\n            masjidId,\n            date,\n            fajr: parseTimeString(pt.fajr, date),\n            dhuhr: parseTimeString(pt.dhuhr, date),\n            asr: parseTimeString(pt.asr, date),\n            maghrib: parseTimeString(pt.maghrib, date),\n            isha: parseTimeString(pt.isha, date),\n            sunrise: parseTimeString(pt.sunrise, date),\n            month: String(date.getMonth()),\n            year: date.getFullYear()\n          },\n        })\n      }),\n    )\n\n    return { success: true, data: createdTimes }\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error saving monthly prayer times:\", error)\n    return { success: false, error: \"Failed to save monthly prayer times\" }\n  }\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\n// Save generated prayer times to database\nexport async function saveMonthlyPrayerTimes(masjidId: string, prayerTimes: any[]) {\n  try {\n    // First delete existing prayer times for this month to avoid duplicates\n    const firstDate = new Date(prayerTimes[0].date)\n    const lastDate = new Date(prayerTimes[prayerTimes.length - 1].date)\n\n    await prisma.prayerTime.deleteMany({\n      where: {\n        masjidId,\n        date: {\n          gte: firstDate,\n          lte: lastDate,\n        },\n      },\n    })\n\n    // Now insert the new prayer times\n    const createdTimes = await Promise.all(\n      prayerTimes.map(async (pt) =\u003e {\n        const date = new Date(pt.date)\n\n        // Parse time strings to Date objects\n        const parseTimeString = (timeStr: string, baseDate: Date) =\u003e {\n          const [time, period] = timeStr.split(\" \")\n          const [hours, minutes] = time.split(\":\").map(Number)\n\n          let hour = hours\n          if (period === \"PM\" \u0026\u0026 hours \u003c 12) hour += 12\n          if (period === \"AM\" \u0026\u0026 hours === 12) hour = 0\n\n          const newDate = new Date(baseDate)\n          newDate.setHours(hour, minutes, 0, 0)\n          return newDate\n        }\n\n        return prisma.prayerTime.create({\n          data: {\n            masjidId,\n            date,\n            fajr: parseTimeString(pt.fajr, date),\n            dhuhr: parseTimeString(pt.dhuhr, date),\n            asr: parseTimeString(pt.asr, date),\n            maghrib: parseTimeString(pt.maghrib, date),\n            isha: parseTimeString(pt.isha, date),\n            sunrise: parseTimeString(pt.sunrise, date),\n            month: String(date.getMonth()),\n            year: date.getFullYear()\n          },\n        })\n      }),\n    )\n\n    return { success: true, data: createdTimes }\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error saving monthly prayer times:\", error)\n    return { success: false, error: \"Failed to save monthly prayer times\" }\n  }\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 321
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 261
          }

        "originalContents": "\n\n// Schema for prayer time calculation settings\nexport const prayerCalculationSchema = z.object({\n  id: z.string().optional(),\n  masjidId: z.string(),\n  calculationMethod: z.enum([\"ISNA\", \"MWL\", \"Karachi\", \"Makkah\", \"Egypt\", \"Custom\"]),\n  asrMethod: z.enum([\"Standard\", \"Hanafi\"]),\n  higherLatitudeMethod: z.enum([\"None\", \"MiddleOfNight\", \"SeventhOfNight\", \"TwilightAngle\"]),\n  fajrOffset: z.number().int(),\n  sunriseOffset: z.number().int(),\n  dhuhrOffset: z.number().int(),\n  asrOffset: z.number().int(),\n  maghribOffset: z.number().int(),\n  ishaOffset: z.number().int(),\n  createdAt: z.date().optional(),\n  updatedAt: z.date().optional(),\n})",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport async function updatePrayerTime(\n  prayerTimeId: string,\n  prayer: string,\n  time: string,\n): Promise\u003c{ success: boolean; error?: string }\u003e {\n  try {\n    const timing = await prisma.prayerTime.findFirst({\n      where: {\n        id: prayerTimeId\n      }\n    });\n    if (!timing) {\n      return { success: false, error: \"Prayer time not found\" };\n    }\n\n    const baseDate = moment(timing.date);\n    const parsedTime = moment(time, [\"h:mm A\"]);\n\n    if (!parsedTime.isValid()) {\n      return { success: false, error: \"Invalid time format\" };\n    }\n\n    baseDate.set(\"hour\", parsedTime.hour());\n    baseDate.set(\"minute\", parsedTime.minute());\n\n    const update = await prisma.prayerTime.update({\n      where: { id: prayerTimeId },\n      data: { [prayer]: baseDate.toDate() }\n    });\n    return { success: true }\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error updating prayer time:\", error)\n    return {\n      success: false,\n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Failed to update prayer time\",\n    }\n  }\n}",

          },

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport async function updatePrayerTime(\n  prayerTimeId: string,\n  prayer: string,\n  time: string,\n): Promise\u003c{ success: boolean; error?: string }\u003e {\n  try {\n    const timing = await prisma.prayerTime.findFirst({\n      where: {\n        id: prayerTimeId\n      }\n    });\n    if (!timing) {\n      return { success: false, error: \"Prayer time not found\" };\n    }\n\n    const baseDate = moment(timing.date);\n    const parsedTime = moment(time, [\"h:mm A\"]);\n\n    if (!parsedTime.isValid()) {\n      return { success: false, error: \"Invalid time format\" };\n    }\n\n    baseDate.set(\"hour\", parsedTime.hour());\n    baseDate.set(\"minute\", parsedTime.minute());\n\n    const update = await prisma.prayerTime.update({\n      where: { id: prayerTimeId },\n      data: { [prayer]: baseDate.toDate() }\n    });\n    return { success: true }\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error updating prayer time:\", error)\n    return {\n      success: false,\n      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Failed to update prayer time\",\n    }\n  }\n}",

        "contents": "\n\n// Format time as HH:MM AM/PM\nfunction formatTime(date: Date) {\n  return date.toLocaleTimeString(\"en-US\", {\n    hour: \"2-digit\",\n    minute: \"2-digit\",\n    hour12: true,\n  })\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\n// Format time as HH:MM AM/PM\nfunction formatTime(date: Date) {\n  return date.toLocaleTimeString(\"en-US\", {\n    hour: \"2-digit\",\n    minute: \"2-digit\",\n    hour12: true,\n  })\n}",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n// Generate prayer times for a specific month and year\nexport async function generateMonthlyPrayerTimes(\n  masjidId: string,\n  month: number,\n  year: number,\n  latitude: number,\n  longitude: number,\n) {\n  try {\n    // Get prayer calculation settings\n    const settings = await getPrayerCalculationSettings(masjidId)\n\n    // Create coordinates\n    const coordinates = new Coordinates(latitude, longitude)\n\n    // Get calculation method based on settings\n    const calculationMethod = getCalculationMethod(settings.calculationMethod)\n\n    // Set madhab for Asr calculation\n    calculationMethod.madhab = getMadhab(settings.asrMethod)\n\n    // Create offsets object\n    const offsets = {\n      fajrOffset: settings.fajrOffset,\n      sunriseOffset: settings.sunriseOffset,\n      dhuhrOffset: settings.dhuhrOffset,\n      asrOffset: settings.asrOffset,\n      maghribOffset: settings.maghribOffset,\n      ishaOffset: settings.ishaOffset,\n    }\n\n    // Get the number of days in the month\n    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month, 0).getDate()\n\n    // Generate prayer times for each day of the month\n    const monthlyTimes = []\n\n    for (let day = 1; day \u003c= daysInMonth; day++) {\n      const date = new Date(year, month - 1, day)\n      const prayerTimes = new PrayerTimes(coordinates, date, calculationMethod)\n      const adjustedTimes = applyOffsets(prayerTimes, offsets)\n\n      monthlyTimes.push({\n        date: date.toISOString().split(\"T\")[0],\n        fajr: formatTime(adjustedTimes.fajr),\n        sunrise: formatTime(adjustedTimes.sunrise),\n        dhuhr: formatTime(adjustedTimes.dhuhr),\n        asr: formatTime(adjustedTimes.asr),\n        maghrib: formatTime(adjustedTimes.maghrib),\n        isha: formatTime(adjustedTimes.isha),\n      })\n    }\n\n    return { success: true, data: monthlyTimes }\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error generating monthly prayer times:\", error)\n    return { success: false, error: \"Failed to generate monthly prayer times\" }\n  }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 202
          },

        "originalContents": "\n\n// Generate prayer times for a specific month and year\nexport async function generateMonthlyPrayerTimes(\n  masjidId: string,\n  month: number,\n  year: number,\n  latitude: number,\n  longitude: number,\n) {\n  try {\n    // Get prayer calculation settings\n    const settings = await getPrayerCalculationSettings(masjidId)\n\n    // Create coordinates\n    const coordinates = new Coordinates(latitude, longitude)\n\n    // Get calculation method based on settings\n    const calculationMethod = getCalculationMethod(settings.calculationMethod)\n\n    // Set madhab for Asr calculation\n    calculationMethod.madhab = getMadhab(settings.asrMethod)\n\n    // Create offsets object\n    const offsets = {\n      fajrOffset: settings.fajrOffset,\n      sunriseOffset: settings.sunriseOffset,\n      dhuhrOffset: settings.dhuhrOffset,\n      asrOffset: settings.asrOffset,\n      maghribOffset: settings.maghribOffset,\n      ishaOffset: settings.ishaOffset,\n    }\n\n    // Get the number of days in the month\n    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month, 0).getDate()\n\n    // Generate prayer times for each day of the month\n    const monthlyTimes = []\n\n    for (let day = 1; day \u003c= daysInMonth; day++) {\n      const date = new Date(year, month - 1, day)\n      const prayerTimes = new PrayerTimes(coordinates, date, calculationMethod)\n      const adjustedTimes = applyOffsets(prayerTimes, offsets)\n\n      monthlyTimes.push({\n        date: date.toISOString().split(\"T\")[0],\n        fajr: formatTime(adjustedTimes.fajr),\n        sunrise: formatTime(adjustedTimes.sunrise),\n        dhuhr: formatTime(adjustedTimes.dhuhr),\n        asr: formatTime(adjustedTimes.asr),\n        maghrib: formatTime(adjustedTimes.maghrib),\n        isha: formatTime(adjustedTimes.isha),\n      })\n    }\n\n    return { success: true, data: monthlyTimes }\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error generating monthly prayer times:\", error)\n    return { success: false, error: \"Failed to generate monthly prayer times\" }\n  }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport async function getMonthPrayerTimes({\n  month,\n  year,\n  masjidId\n}: {\n    month: number;\n    year: number;\n    masjidId: string;\n}) {\n  const prayerTimes = await prisma.prayerTime.findMany({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n      month: String(month),\n      year\n    },\n    orderBy: {\n      date: \"asc\"\n    }\n  });\n\n  return prayerTimes || [];\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 322
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 323,
            "text": "export async function getMonthPrayerTimes({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 324,
            "text": "  month,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 325,
            "text": "  year,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326,
            "text": "  masjidId"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 344,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\nexport async function getMonthPrayerTimes({\n  month,\n  year,\n  masjidId\n}: {\n    month: number;\n    year: number;\n    masjidId: string;\n}) {\n  const prayerTimes = await prisma.prayerTime.findMany({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n      month: String(month),\n      year\n    },\n    orderBy: {\n      date: \"asc\"\n    }\n  });\n\n  return prayerTimes || [];\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

            "line": 321
          }

        "contents": "model IqamahTiming {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  masjid      Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  changeDate  DateTime\n  fajr        String\n  dhuhr       String\n  asr         String\n  maghrib     String\n  maghribType String\n  maghribOffset String\n  isha        String\n  jumuahI     String?\n  jumuahII    String?\n  jumuahIII   String?\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n}\n",

        "contents": "\n\nasync function getPrayerTimings(masjidId: string) {\n  const prayerTimings = await prisma.prayerTime.findMany({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n    },\n    orderBy: {\n      date: \"asc\"\n    }\n  })\n  return prayerTimings.length \u003c 2 ? (prayerTimings.length === 0 ? [] : [prayerTimings]) : prayerTimings\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n// Function to apply offsets to prayer times\nfunction applyOffsets(prayerTimes: PrayerTimes, offsets: Record\u003cstring, number\u003e) {\n  const adjustedTimes = {\n    fajr: new Date(prayerTimes.fajr.getTime() + offsets.fajrOffset * 60 * 1000),\n    sunrise: new Date(prayerTimes.sunrise.getTime() + offsets.sunriseOffset * 60 * 1000),\n    dhuhr: new Date(prayerTimes.dhuhr.getTime() + offsets.dhuhrOffset * 60 * 1000),\n    asr: new Date(prayerTimes.asr.getTime() + offsets.asrOffset * 60 * 1000),\n    maghrib: new Date(prayerTimes.maghrib.getTime() + offsets.maghribOffset * 60 * 1000),\n    isha: new Date(prayerTimes.isha.getTime() + offsets.ishaOffset * 60 * 1000),\n  }\n\n  return adjustedTimes\n}",

            "lineNumber": 178

            "lineNumber": 179

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n// Function to apply offsets to prayer times\nfunction applyOffsets(prayerTimes: PrayerTimes, offsets: Record\u003cstring, number\u003e) {\n  const adjustedTimes = {\n    fajr: new Date(prayerTimes.fajr.getTime() + offsets.fajrOffset * 60 * 1000),\n    sunrise: new Date(prayerTimes.sunrise.getTime() + offsets.sunriseOffset * 60 * 1000),\n    dhuhr: new Date(prayerTimes.dhuhr.getTime() + offsets.dhuhrOffset * 60 * 1000),\n    asr: new Date(prayerTimes.asr.getTime() + offsets.asrOffset * 60 * 1000),\n    maghrib: new Date(prayerTimes.maghrib.getTime() + offsets.maghribOffset * 60 * 1000),\n    isha: new Date(prayerTimes.isha.getTime() + offsets.ishaOffset * 60 * 1000),\n  }\n\n  return adjustedTimes\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nasync function getPrayerCalculationSettings(masjidId: string) {\n  const prayerCalculation = await prisma.prayerCalculation.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n    },\n  })\n  return (\n    prayerCalculation || {\n      id: \"calc-1\",\n      masjidId,\n      calculationMethod: \"ISNA\",\n      asrMethod: \"Standard\",\n      higherLatitudeMethod: \"None\",\n      fajrOffset: 0,\n      sunriseOffset: 0,\n      dhuhrOffset: 0,\n      asrOffset: 0,\n      maghribOffset: 0,\n      ishaOffset: 0,\n    }\n  )\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\nasync function getPrayerCalculationSettings(masjidId: string) {\n  const prayerCalculation = await prisma.prayerCalculation.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n    },\n  })\n  return (\n    prayerCalculation || {\n      id: \"calc-1\",\n      masjidId,\n      calculationMethod: \"ISNA\",\n      asrMethod: \"Standard\",\n      higherLatitudeMethod: \"None\",\n      fajrOffset: 0,\n      sunriseOffset: 0,\n      dhuhrOffset: 0,\n      asrOffset: 0,\n      maghribOffset: 0,\n      ishaOffset: 0,\n    }\n  )\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use server\"\n\nimport { revalidatePath } from \"next/cache\"\nimport { z } from \"zod\"\nimport { iqamahTimingSchema, iqamahTimingSchemaAPI, prayerCalculationSchema } from \"../models/iqamah-timings\"\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\"\nimport { CalculationMethod, Coordinates, Madhab, PrayerTimes } from \"adhan\"\nimport moment from \"moment\";\n\n\nasync function savePrayerCalculationSettings(data: any, masjidId: string) {\n  const update = await prisma.prayerCalculation.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n    },\n  })\n\n  if (!update) {\n    const prayerCalculation = await prisma.prayerCalculation.create({\n      data: {\n        ...data,\n        masjidId,\n      },\n    })\n    return prayerCalculation\n  } else {\n    const prayerCalculation = await prisma.prayerCalculation.update({\n      where: {\n        id: update.id,\n      },\n      data: data,\n    })\n    return prayerCalculation\n  }\n}",

        "originalContents": "\"use server\"\n\nimport { revalidatePath } from \"next/cache\"\nimport { z } from \"zod\"\nimport { iqamahTimingSchema, iqamahTimingSchemaAPI, prayerCalculationSchema } from \"../models/iqamah-timings\"\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\"\nimport { CalculationMethod, Coordinates, Madhab, PrayerTimes } from \"adhan\"\nimport moment from \"moment\";\n\n\nasync function savePrayerCalculationSettings(data: any, masjidId: string) {\n  const update = await prisma.prayerCalculation.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n    },\n  })\n\n  if (!update) {\n    const prayerCalculation = await prisma.prayerCalculation.create({\n      data: {\n        ...data,\n        masjidId,\n      },\n    })\n    return prayerCalculation\n  } else {\n    const prayerCalculation = await prisma.prayerCalculation.update({\n      where: {\n        id: update.id,\n      },\n      data: data,\n    })\n    return prayerCalculation\n  }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport const iqamahTimingSchemaAPI = z.object({\n  id: z.string().optional(),\n  masjidId: z.string(),\n  changeDate: z.date(),\n  fajr: z.string(), // Time format: \"HH:MM AM/PM\" or \"HH:MM\" (24h)\n  dhuhr: z.string(),\n  asr: z.string(),\n  maghrib: z.string(),\n  maghribType: z.string(),\n  maghribOffset: z.string(),\n  isha: z.string(),\n  jumuahI: z.string().optional(),\n  jumuahII: z.string().optional(),\n  jumuahIII: z.string().optional(),\n  createdAt: z.date().optional(),\n  updatedAt: z.date().optional(),\n})",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "export const iqamahTimingSchemaAPI = z.object({"

          },

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\nexport const iqamahTimingSchemaAPI = z.object({\n  id: z.string().optional(),\n  masjidId: z.string(),\n  changeDate: z.date(),\n  fajr: z.string(), // Time format: \"HH:MM AM/PM\" or \"HH:MM\" (24h)\n  dhuhr: z.string(),\n  asr: z.string(),\n  maghrib: z.string(),\n  maghribType: z.string(),\n  maghribOffset: z.string(),\n  isha: z.string(),\n  jumuahI: z.string().optional(),\n  jumuahII: z.string().optional(),\n  jumuahIII: z.string().optional(),\n  createdAt: z.date().optional(),\n  updatedAt: z.date().optional(),\n})",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 3,
            "line": 41
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 23
          }
        },

      },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport function EditPrayerTimeDialog({\n  open,\n  onOpenChange,\n  prayerTime,\n  masjidId,\n  onSuccess,\n}: EditPrayerTimeDialogProps) {\n  const [hours, setHours] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"12\")\n  const [minutes, setMinutes] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"00\")\n  const [period, setPeriod] = useState\u003c\"AM\" | \"PM\"\u003e(\"AM\")\n  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)\n  const { toast } = useToast()\n\n  // Parse the time when the dialog opens\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (open \u0026\u0026 prayerTime.time) {\n      const [timeStr, timePeriod] = prayerTime.time.split(\" \")\n      const [hoursStr, minutesStr] = timeStr.split(\":\")\n\n      setHours(hoursStr)\n      setMinutes(minutesStr)\n      setPeriod(timePeriod as \"AM\" | \"PM\")\n    }\n  }, [open, prayerTime.time])\n\n  const formatDate = (dateString: string) =\u003e {\n    if (!dateString) return \"\"\n    const date = new Date(dateString)\n    return date.toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n      weekday: \"short\",\n      month: \"short\",\n      day: \"numeric\",\n      year: \"numeric\",\n    })\n  }\n\n  const getPrayerName = (prayer: string) =\u003e {\n    const prayerNames = {\n      fajr: \"Fajr\",\n      sunrise: \"Sunrise\",\n      dhuhr: \"Dhuhr\",\n      asr: \"Asr\",\n      maghrib: \"Maghrib\",\n      isha: \"Isha\",\n    }\n    return prayerNames[prayer as keyof typeof prayerNames] || prayer\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [

          },

          },

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport function EditPrayerTimeDialog({\n  open,\n  onOpenChange,\n  prayerTime,\n  masjidId,\n  onSuccess,\n}: EditPrayerTimeDialogProps) {\n  const [hours, setHours] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"12\")\n  const [minutes, setMinutes] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"00\")\n  const [period, setPeriod] = useState\u003c\"AM\" | \"PM\"\u003e(\"AM\")\n  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)\n  const { toast } = useToast()\n\n  // Parse the time when the dialog opens\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (open \u0026\u0026 prayerTime.time) {\n      const [timeStr, timePeriod] = prayerTime.time.split(\" \")\n      const [hoursStr, minutesStr] = timeStr.split(\":\")\n\n      setHours(hoursStr)\n      setMinutes(minutesStr)\n      setPeriod(timePeriod as \"AM\" | \"PM\")\n    }\n  }, [open, prayerTime.time])\n\n  const formatDate = (dateString: string) =\u003e {\n    if (!dateString) return \"\"\n    const date = new Date(dateString)\n    return date.toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n      weekday: \"short\",\n      month: \"short\",\n      day: \"numeric\",\n      year: \"numeric\",\n    })\n  }\n\n  const getPrayerName = (prayer: string) =\u003e {\n    const prayerNames = {\n      fajr: \"Fajr\",\n      sunrise: \"Sunrise\",\n      dhuhr: \"Dhuhr\",\n      asr: \"Asr\",\n      maghrib: \"Maghrib\",\n      isha: \"Isha\",\n    }\n    return prayerNames[prayer as keyof typeof prayerNames] || prayer\n  }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport async function fetchPrayerCalculationSettings(masjidId: string) {\n  try {\n    const settings = await getPrayerCalculationSettings(masjidId)\n    return { success: true, data: settings }\n  } catch (error) {\n    return { success: false, error: JSON.stringify(error) }\n  }\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport async function fetchPrayerCalculationSettings(masjidId: string) {\n  try {\n    const settings = await getPrayerCalculationSettings(masjidId)\n    return { success: true, data: settings }\n  } catch (error) {\n    return { success: false, error: JSON.stringify(error) }\n  }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Theme {\n  id       String @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId String\n  masjid   Masjid @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  name       String\n  configJson Json // stores layout/colors/etc.\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n\n  devices Device[]\n}\n\nmodel PrayerTime {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  date        DateTime\n  fajr        DateTime\n  sunrise     DateTime\n  dhuhr       DateTime\n  asr         DateTime\n  maghrib     DateTime\n  isha        DateTime\n  isCalculated Boolean  @default(true)\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n  month String\n  year Int\n\n  // Relation to Masjid\n  masjid      Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([masjidId])\n  @@index([date])\n  @@unique([masjidId, date])\n}\n\nmodel Flyer {\n  id       String @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId String\n  masjid   Masjid @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  title     String\n  imageUrl  String\n  startTime DateTime\n  endTime   DateTime\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n}\n\nmodel Products {\n  id                     String   @id\n  name                   String\n  description            String\n  features               String[]\n  price                  Int\n  requiredSubscriptionId String\n  popular                Boolean  @default(false)\n  image                  String   @default(\"placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=300\")\n  category               String   @default(\"\")\n  role                   String   @default(\"subscription\")\n  url                    String   @default(\"\")\n}\n\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "model Theme {\n  id       String @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId String\n  masjid   Masjid @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  name       String\n  configJson Json // stores layout/colors/etc.\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n\n  devices Device[]\n}\n\nmodel PrayerTime {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  date        DateTime\n  fajr        DateTime\n  sunrise     DateTime\n  dhuhr       DateTime\n  asr         DateTime\n  maghrib     DateTime\n  isha        DateTime\n  isCalculated Boolean  @default(true)\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n  month String\n  year Int\n\n  // Relation to Masjid\n  masjid      Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([masjidId])\n  @@index([date])\n  @@unique([masjidId, date])\n}\n\nmodel Flyer {\n  id       String @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId String\n  masjid   Masjid @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  title     String\n  imageUrl  String\n  startTime DateTime\n  endTime   DateTime\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n}\n\nmodel Products {\n  id                     String   @id\n  name                   String\n  description            String\n  features               String[]\n  price                  Int\n  requiredSubscriptionId String\n  popular                Boolean  @default(false)\n  image                  String   @default(\"placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=300\")\n  category               String   @default(\"\")\n  role                   String   @default(\"subscription\")\n  url                    String   @default(\"\")\n}\n\n",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { z } from \"zod\"\n\n// Schema for Iqamah timing entry\nexport const iqamahTimingSchema = z.object({\n  id: z.string().optional(),\n  masjidId: z.string(),\n  changeDate: z.object({\n    from: z.date(),\n    to: z.date(),\n  }),\n  fajr: z.string(), // Time format: \"HH:MM AM/PM\" or \"HH:MM\" (24h)\n  dhuhr: z.string(),\n  asr: z.string(),\n  maghrib: z.string(),\n  maghribType: z.string(),\n  maghribOffset: z.number(),\n  isha: z.string(),\n  jumuahI: z.string().optional(),\n  jumuahII: z.string().optional(),\n  jumuahIII: z.string().optional(),\n  createdAt: z.date().optional(),\n  updatedAt: z.date().optional(),\n});",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import { z } from \"zod\""
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "// Schema for Iqamah timing entry"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "export const iqamahTimingSchema = z.object({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "  id: z.string().optional(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "  masjidId: z.string(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "  changeDate: z.object({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    from: z.date(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    to: z.date(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "  }),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  fajr: z.string(), // Time format: \"HH:MM AM/PM\" or \"HH:MM\" (24h)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "  dhuhr: z.string(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "  asr: z.string(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "  maghrib: z.string(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "  maghribType: z.string(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "  maghribOffset: z.number(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  isha: z.string(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "  jumuahI: z.string().optional(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  jumuahII: z.string().optional(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "  jumuahIII: z.string().optional(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "  createdAt: z.date().optional(),"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "  updatedAt: z.date().optional(),"

          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "});"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "import { z } from \"zod\"\n\n// Schema for Iqamah timing entry\nexport const iqamahTimingSchema = z.object({\n  id: z.string().optional(),\n  masjidId: z.string(),\n  changeDate: z.object({\n    from: z.date(),\n    to: z.date(),\n  }),\n  fajr: z.string(), // Time format: \"HH:MM AM/PM\" or \"HH:MM\" (24h)\n  dhuhr: z.string(),\n  asr: z.string(),\n  maghrib: z.string(),\n  maghribType: z.string(),\n  maghribOffset: z.number(),\n  isha: z.string(),\n  jumuahI: z.string().optional(),\n  jumuahII: z.string().optional(),\n  jumuahIII: z.string().optional(),\n  createdAt: z.date().optional(),\n  updatedAt: z.date().optional(),\n});",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 23
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "lib/models/iqamah-timings.ts"
      },

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nfunction getCalculationMethod(methodName: string) {\n  switch (methodName) {\n    case \"ISNA\":\n      return CalculationMethod.NorthAmerica()\n    case \"MWL\":\n      return CalculationMethod.MuslimWorldLeague()\n    case \"Karachi\":\n      return CalculationMethod.Karachi()\n    case \"Makkah\":\n      return CalculationMethod.UmmAlQura()\n    case \"Egypt\":\n      return CalculationMethod.Egyptian()\n    default:\n      return CalculationMethod.NorthAmerica()\n  }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 156
          },

            "lineNumber": 157

          },

        "originalContents": "\n\nfunction getCalculationMethod(methodName: string) {\n  switch (methodName) {\n    case \"ISNA\":\n      return CalculationMethod.NorthAmerica()\n    case \"MWL\":\n      return CalculationMethod.MuslimWorldLeague()\n    case \"Karachi\":\n      return CalculationMethod.Karachi()\n    case \"Makkah\":\n      return CalculationMethod.UmmAlQura()\n    case \"Egypt\":\n      return CalculationMethod.Egyptian()\n    default:\n      return CalculationMethod.NorthAmerica()\n  }\n}",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nasync function getIqamahTimings(masjidId: string) {\n  const iqamahTimings = await prisma.iqamahTiming.findMany({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n    },\n    orderBy: {\n      changeDate: \"desc\"\n    },\n  })\n  return iqamahTimings.length \u003c 1 ? (iqamahTimings.length === 0 ? [] : [iqamahTimings]) : iqamahTimings\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport async function fetchPrayerTimings(masjidId: string) {\n  try {\n    const timings = await getPrayerTimings(masjidId)\n    return { success: true, data: timings }\n  } catch (error) {\n    return { success: false, error: JSON.stringify(error) }\n  }\n}",

_**Agent**_

I see the issue now. Looking at the code, there are a few problems:

1. In the database schema (`PrayerTime` model), the prayer times are stored as `DateTime` fields
2. In the `edit-prayer-time-dialog.tsx`, the time parsing logic assumes the time is coming in as a string in "HH:MM AM/PM" format
3. The actual time data is coming from the database as a `DateTime` object

Let me fix the `edit-prayer-time-dialog.tsx` component to properly handle the DateTime format:


_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file** • Edit file: components/dashboard/edit-prayer-time-dialog.tsx</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 16, lines removed: 6

```diff
@@ -46,10 +46,20 @@
    useEffect(() =&gt; {
      if (open &amp;&amp; prayerTime.time) {
-       const [timeStr, timePeriod] = prayerTime.time.split(" ")
-       const [hoursStr, minutesStr] = timeStr.split(":")
- 
-       setHours(hoursStr)
-       setMinutes(minutesStr)
-       setPeriod(timePeriod as "AM" | "PM")
+       // Convert the time to a Date object if it's a string
+       const timeDate = typeof prayerTime.time === 'string' 
+         ? new Date(&#96;2000-01-01T${prayerTime.time}&#96;)
+         : new Date(prayerTime.time);
+ 
+       // Format the time in 12-hour format
+       const hours = timeDate.getHours();
+       const minutes = timeDate.getMinutes();
+       
+       // Convert to 12-hour format
+       const period = hours &gt;= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
+       const hours12 = hours % 12 || 12;
+       
+       setHours(hours12.toString().padStart(2, '0'));
+       setMinutes(minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0'));
+       setPeriod(period);
      }
    }, [open, prayerTime.time])
```

_**Agent**_

I've updated the time parsing logic in the `edit-prayer-time-dialog.tsx` component to:

1. Handle both string and DateTime inputs
2. Properly convert the time to 12-hour format
3. Ensure hours and minutes are always two digits with leading zeros
4. Correctly determine AM/PM based on the hour

This should now correctly display the prayer times from the database. The component will:
1. Take the time from the database (which is a DateTime)
2. Convert it to a proper Date object
3. Extract hours and minutes
4. Convert to 12-hour format with AM/PM
5. Display it in the input fields

The times should now load correctly when editing prayer times. Let me know if you need any adjustments or if you're still seeing any issues!

        "originalContents": "\n\n              \u003cdiv\u003e\n                \u003cFormLabel className=\"block mb-2 text-[#3A3A3A]\"\u003eIsha\u003c/FormLabel\u003e\n                \u003cFormField\n                  control={form.control}\n                  name=\"isha\"\n                  render={({ field }) =\u003e (\n                    \u003cFormItem\u003e\n                      \u003cFormControl\u003e\n                        \u003cTimeInput\n                          value={field.value}\n                          onChange={field.onChange}\n                          className=\"border-[#550C18]/20 focus-visible:ring-[#550C18]/30\"\n                        /\u003e\n                      \u003c/FormControl\u003e\n                    \u003c/FormItem\u003e\n                  )}\n                /\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n\n            \u003cdiv className=\"pt-4\"\u003e\n              \u003ch3 className=\"text-lg font-medium mb-4 text-[#550C18]\"\u003eJumuah Prayer Times\u003c/h3\u003e",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function AddIqamahTimingForm({ masjidId, lastIqamah, onSuccess }: AddIqamahTimingFormProps) {\n...\nexport function AddIqamahTimingForm({ masjidId, lastIqamah, onSuccess }: AddIqamahTimingFormProps) {\n  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  async function onSubmit(values: z.infer\u003ctypeof iqamahTimingSchema\u003e) {\n    console.log(values);\n    setIsSubmitting(true)\n    try {\n      const cleanedValues = {\n        ...values,\n        fajr: formatTime(values.fajr),\n        dhuhr: formatTime(values.dhuhr),\n        asr: formatTime(values.asr),\n        maghrib: formatTime(values.maghrib),\n        isha: formatTime(values.isha),\n        jumuahI: formatTime(values.jumuahI || \"\"),\n        jumuahII: formatTime(values.jumuahII || \"\"),\n        jumuahIII: formatTime(values.jumuahIII || \"\"),\n      }\n\n      const result = await addIqamahTiming(cleanedValues)\n\n      if (result.success) {\n        toast({\n          title: \"Iqamah timing added\",\n          description: \"New Iqamah timing has been added successfully.\",\n        })\n        if (onSuccess) onSuccess()\n      } else {\n        const t = toast({\n          title: \"Error\",\n          description: \"Failed to add Iqamah timing.\",\n          variant: \"destructive\",\n        });\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"Error\",\n        description: \"An unexpected error occurred.\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      })\n    } finally {\n      setIsSubmitting(false)\n    }\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 25.5,
            "text": "..."
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 26,

        "originalContents": "\n\n  async function onSubmit(values: z.infer\u003ctypeof iqamahTimingSchema\u003e) {\n    console.log(values);\n    setIsSubmitting(true)\n    try {\n      const cleanedValues = {\n        ...values,\n        fajr: formatTime(values.fajr),\n        dhuhr: formatTime(values.dhuhr),\n        asr: formatTime(values.asr),\n        maghrib: formatTime(values.maghrib),\n        isha: formatTime(values.isha),\n        jumuahI: formatTime(values.jumuahI || \"\"),\n        jumuahII: formatTime(values.jumuahII || \"\"),\n        jumuahIII: formatTime(values.jumuahIII || \"\"),\n      }\n\n      const result = await addIqamahTiming(cleanedValues)\n\n      if (result.success) {\n        toast({\n          title: \"Iqamah timing added\",\n          description: \"New Iqamah timing has been added successfully.\",\n        })\n        if (onSuccess) onSuccess()\n      } else {\n        const t = toast({\n          title: \"Error\",\n          description: \"Failed to add Iqamah timing.\",\n          variant: \"destructive\",\n        });\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"Error\",\n        description: \"An unexpected error occurred.\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      })\n    } finally {\n      setIsSubmitting(false)\n    }\n  }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\"\nimport { zodResolver } from \"@hookform/resolvers/zod\"\nimport { useForm } from \"react-hook-form\"\nimport type { z } from \"zod\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Form, FormControl, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel } from \"@/components/ui/form\"\nimport { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from \"@/components/ui/select\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { iqamahTimingSchema } from \"@/lib/models/iqamah-timings\"\nimport { addIqamahTiming } from \"@/lib/actions/prayer-times\"\nimport { TimeInput } from \"@/components/ui/time-input\"\nimport { MaghribInput } from \"@/components/ui/maghrib-input\"\nimport { DatePicker } from \"@/components/ui/date-picker\"\nimport { CalendarDatePicker } from \"@/components/ui/calendar-date-picker\"\nimport { IqamahTiming } from \"@prisma/client\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\n\ntype AddIqamahTimingFormProps = {\n  masjidId: string;\n  lastIqamah: IqamahTiming | null;\n  onSuccess?: () =\u003e void\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function AddIqamahTimingForm({ masjidId, lastIqamah, onSuccess }: AddIqamahTimingFormProps) {\n...\nexport function AddIqamahTimingForm({ masjidId, lastIqamah, onSuccess }: AddIqamahTimingFormProps) {\n  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"p-4\"\u003e\n      \u003ch2 className=\"text-xl font-semibold mb-6 text-[#550C18]\"\u003eAdd Iqamah\u003c/h2\u003e\n\n      \u003cForm {...form}\u003e\n        \u003cform onSubmit={async () =\u003e await onSubmit(form.getValues())} className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-4\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv\u003e\n              \u003cFormLabel className=\"block mb-2 text-[#3A3A3A]\"\u003eIqamah Change Date\u003c/FormLabel\u003e\n              \u003cFormField\n                control={form.control}\n                name=\"changeDate\"\n                render={({ field }) =\u003e (\n                  \u003cFormItem\u003e\n                    \u003cFormControl\u003e\n                      \u003cCalendarDatePicker\n                        date={field.value}\n                        onDateSelect={({ from, to }) =\u003e {\n                          form.setValue(\"changeDate\", { from, to });\n                        }}\n                        numberOfMonths={1}\n                        className=\"min-w-[250px]\"\n                      /\u003e\n                    \u003c/FormControl\u003e\n                  \u003c/FormItem\u003e\n                )}\n              /\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 25.5,
            "text": "..."
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "export function AddIqamahTimingForm({ masjidId, lastIqamah, onSuccess }: AddIqamahTimingFormProps) {"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "export function AddIqamahTimingForm({ masjidId, lastIqamah, onSuccess }: AddIqamahTimingFormProps) {"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)"

        "originalContents": "\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"p-4\"\u003e\n      \u003ch2 className=\"text-xl font-semibold mb-6 text-[#550C18]\"\u003eAdd Iqamah\u003c/h2\u003e\n\n      \u003cForm {...form}\u003e\n        \u003cform onSubmit={async () =\u003e await onSubmit(form.getValues())} className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-4\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv\u003e\n              \u003cFormLabel className=\"block mb-2 text-[#3A3A3A]\"\u003eIqamah Change Date\u003c/FormLabel\u003e\n              \u003cFormField\n                control={form.control}\n                name=\"changeDate\"\n                render={({ field }) =\u003e (\n                  \u003cFormItem\u003e\n                    \u003cFormControl\u003e\n                      \u003cCalendarDatePicker\n                        date={field.value}\n                        onDateSelect={({ from, to }) =\u003e {\n                          form.setValue(\"changeDate\", { from, to });\n                        }}\n                        numberOfMonths={1}\n                        className=\"min-w-[250px]\"\n                      /\u003e\n                    \u003c/FormControl\u003e\n                  \u003c/FormItem\u003e\n                )}\n              /\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 19,
            "line": 134
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 105

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport function AddIqamahTimingForm({ masjidId, lastIqamah, onSuccess }: AddIqamahTimingFormProps) {\n  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)\n\n  const form = useForm\u003cz.infer\u003ctypeof iqamahTimingSchema\u003e\u003e({\n    resolver: zodResolver(iqamahTimingSchema),\n    defaultValues: {\n      masjidId,\n      changeDate: {\n        from: new Date(),\n        to: new Date()\n      },\n      fajr: lastIqamah?.fajr || \"\",\n      dhuhr: lastIqamah?.dhuhr || \"\",\n      asr: lastIqamah?.asr || \"\",\n      maghrib: lastIqamah?.maghrib || \"0\", // Default to 0 for \"at sunset\"\n      maghribOffset: Number(lastIqamah?.maghribOffset) || 0,\n      maghribType: lastIqamah?.maghribType || \"Offset\",\n      isha: lastIqamah?.isha || \"\",\n      jumuahI: lastIqamah?.jumuahI || \"\",\n      jumuahII: lastIqamah?.jumuahII || \"\",\n      jumuahIII: lastIqamah?.jumuahIII || \"\",\n    },\n  })\n\n  function formatTime(time: string): string {\n    if (!time) return \"\";\n\n    // Match common time formats like HH:MM or HH:MM am/pm\n    const match = time.match(/^(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{1,2})(\\s?[aApP][mM])?$/);\n\n    if (!match) return time;\n\n    let [, hour, minute, suffix] = match;\n    hour = hour.padStart(2, \"0\");\n    minute = minute.slice(0, 2).padStart(2, \"0\"); // prevent 045\n\n    return &#96;${hour}:${minute}${suffix ? suffix.trim().toLowerCase() : \"\"}&#96;;\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport function AddIqamahTimingForm({ masjidId, lastIqamah, onSuccess }: AddIqamahTimingFormProps) {\n  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)\n\n  const form = useForm\u003cz.infer\u003ctypeof iqamahTimingSchema\u003e\u003e({\n    resolver: zodResolver(iqamahTimingSchema),\n    defaultValues: {\n      masjidId,\n      changeDate: {\n        from: new Date(),\n        to: new Date()\n      },\n      fajr: lastIqamah?.fajr || \"\",\n      dhuhr: lastIqamah?.dhuhr || \"\",\n      asr: lastIqamah?.asr || \"\",\n      maghrib: lastIqamah?.maghrib || \"0\", // Default to 0 for \"at sunset\"\n      maghribOffset: Number(lastIqamah?.maghribOffset) || 0,\n      maghribType: lastIqamah?.maghribType || \"Offset\",\n      isha: lastIqamah?.isha || \"\",\n      jumuahI: lastIqamah?.jumuahI || \"\",\n      jumuahII: lastIqamah?.jumuahII || \"\",\n      jumuahIII: lastIqamah?.jumuahIII || \"\",\n    },\n  })\n\n  function formatTime(time: string): string {\n    if (!time) return \"\";\n\n    // Match common time formats like HH:MM or HH:MM am/pm\n    const match = time.match(/^(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{1,2})(\\s?[aApP][mM])?$/);\n\n    if (!match) return time;\n\n    let [, hour, minute, suffix] = match;\n    hour = hour.padStart(2, \"0\");\n    minute = minute.slice(0, 2).padStart(2, \"0\"); // prevent 045\n\n    return &#96;${hour}:${minute}${suffix ? suffix.trim().toLowerCase() : \"\"}&#96;;\n  }",

(\n                  \u003c\u003e\n                    \u003cFormField\n                      control={form.control}\n                      name=\"maghrib\"\n                      render={({ field }) =\u003e (\n                        \u003cFormItem\u003e\n                          \u003cFormControl\u003e\n                            \u003cTimeInput\n                              value={field.value}\n                              onChange={field.onChange}\n                              className=\"border-[#550C18]/20 focus-visible:ring-[#550C18]/30\"\n                            /\u003e\n                          \u003c/FormControl\u003e\n                        \u003c/FormItem\u003e\n                      )}\n                    /\u003e\n                  \u003c/\u003e\n                ) : (\n                  \u003c\u003e\n                    \u003cFormField\n                      control={form.control}\n                      name=\"maghribOffset\"\n                      render={({ field }) =\u003e (\n                        \u003cFormItem\u003e\n                          \u003cFormControl\u003e\n                            \u003cInput\n                              value={field.value}\n                              onChange={field.onChange}\n                              type=\"number\"\n                              className=\"border-[#550C18]/20 focus-visible:ring-[#550C18]/30\"\n                            /\u003e\n                          \u003c/FormControl\u003e\n                        \u003c/FormItem\u003e\n                      )}\n                    /\u003e\n                  \u003c/\u003e\n                )}\n              \u003c/div\u003e",

        "contents": "export function AddIqamahTimingForm({ masjidId, lastIqamah, onSuccess }: AddIqamahTimingFormProps) {\n...\nexport function AddIqamahTimingForm({ masjidId, lastIqamah, onSuccess }: AddIqamahTimingFormProps) {\n  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)\n\n\n                ...\n\n\n                \u003cdiv\u003e\n                  \u003cFormLabel className=\"block mb-2 text-[#3A3A3A]\"\u003eJumuah III\u003c/FormLabel\u003e\n                  \u003cFormField\n                    control={form.control}\n                    name=\"jumuahIII\"\n                    render={({ field }) =\u003e (\n                      \u003cFormItem\u003e\n                        \u003cFormControl\u003e\n                          \u003cTimeInput\n                            value={field.value || \"\"}\n                            onChange={field.onChange}\n                            className=\"border-[#550C18]/20 focus-visible:ring-[#550C18]/30\"\n                          /\u003e\n                        \u003c/FormControl\u003e\n                      \u003c/FormItem\u003e\n                    )}\n                  /\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n\n          \u003cdiv className=\"flex justify-end gap-3 pt-4\"\u003e\n            \u003cButton\n              variant=\"outline\"\n              type=\"button\"\n              onClick={() =\u003e onSuccess?.()}\n              className=\"border-[#550C18]/20 text-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#550C18]/5\"\n            \u003e\n              Cancel\n            \u003c/Button\u003e\n            \u003cButton \n              type=\"submit\" \n              className=\"bg-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#78001A] text-white\" \n              disabled={isSubmitting}\n            \u003e\n              {isSubmitting ? \"Adding...\" : \"Add\"}\n            \u003c/Button\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/form\u003e\n      \u003c/Form\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n  )\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\"\nimport { zodResolver } from \"@hookform/resolvers/zod\"\nimport { useForm } from \"react-hook-form\"\nimport type { z } from \"zod\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Form, FormControl, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel } from \"@/components/ui/form\"\nimport { useToast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { iqamahTimingSchema } from \"@/lib/models/iqamah-timings\"\nimport { updateIqamahTiming } from \"@/lib/actions/prayer-times\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { TimeInput } from \"@/components/ui/time-input\"\nimport { MaghribInput } from \"@/components/ui/maghrib-input\"\nimport { CalendarDatePicker } from \"@/components/ui/calendar-date-picker\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/hooks/use-toast\"\n\ntype EditIqamahTimingFormProps = {\n  timing: any\n  onSuccess?: () =\u003e void\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function EditIqamahTimingForm({ timing, onSuccess }: EditIqamahTimingFormProps) {\n...\nexport function EditIqamahTimingForm({ timing, onSuccess }: EditIqamahTimingFormProps) {\n  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"p-4\"\u003e\n      \u003ch2 className=\"text-xl font-semibold mb-6\"\u003eUpdate Iqamah\u003c/h2\u003e\n\n      \u003cForm {...form}\u003e\n        \u003cform onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-4\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv\u003e\n              \u003cFormLabel className=\"block mb-2\"\u003eIqamah Change Date\u003c/FormLabel\u003e\n              \u003cFormField\n                control={form.control}\n                name=\"changeDate\"\n                render={({ field }) =\u003e (\n                  \u003cFormItem\u003e\n                    \u003cFormControl\u003e\n                      \u003cCalendarDatePicker\n                        date={{\n                          to: field.value.to,\n                          from: field.value.from\n                        }}\n                        onDateSelect={({ from, to }) =\u003e {\n                          form.setValue(\"changeDate\", { from, to });\n                        }}\n                        numberOfMonths={1}\n                        className=\"w-full\"\n                      /\u003e\n                    \u003c/FormControl\u003e\n                  \u003c/FormItem\u003e\n                )}\n              /\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\"\nimport { format } from \"date-fns\"\nimport { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from \"@/components/ui/table\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Edit2, Trash2, Copy, ArrowUpDown, Upload } from \"lucide-react\"\nimport { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/dropdown-menu\"\nimport { useToast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogTitle } from \"@/components/ui/dialog\"\nimport { EditIqamahTimingForm } from \"./edit-iqamah-timing-form\"\nimport { UploadIqamahTimings } from \"./upload-iqamah-timings\"\nimport { deleteIqamahTiming, duplicateIqamahTiming } from \"@/lib/actions/prayer-times\"\n\ntype IqamahTimingsTableProps = {\n  timings: any[]\n  loading: boolean\n  onRefresh: () =\u003e void\n  masjidId?: string\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "\"use client\""

        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\"\nimport { format } from \"date-fns\"\nimport { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from \"@/components/ui/table\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Edit2, Trash2, Copy, ArrowUpDown, Upload } from \"lucide-react\"\nimport { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/dropdown-menu\"\nimport { useToast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogTitle } from \"@/components/ui/dialog\"\nimport { EditIqamahTimingForm } from \"./edit-iqamah-timing-form\"\nimport { UploadIqamahTimings } from \"./upload-iqamah-timings\"\nimport { deleteIqamahTiming, duplicateIqamahTiming } from \"@/lib/actions/prayer-times\"\n\ntype IqamahTimingsTableProps = {\n  timings: any[]\n  loading: boolean\n  onRefresh: () =\u003e void\n  masjidId?: string\n}",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport function EditIqamahTimingForm({ timing, onSuccess }: EditIqamahTimingFormProps) {\n  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)\n\n  const form = useForm\u003cz.infer\u003ctypeof iqamahTimingSchema\u003e\u003e({\n    resolver: zodResolver(iqamahTimingSchema),\n    defaultValues: {\n      ...timing,\n      changeDate: {\n        from: new Date(timing.changeDate),\n        to: new Date(timing.changeDate)\n      },\n    },\n  })\n  \n  async function onSubmit(values: z.infer\u003ctypeof iqamahTimingSchema\u003e) {\n    setIsSubmitting(true)\n\n    // Convert range to a single date string or the expected format\n    try {\n      const result = await updateIqamahTiming({\n        ...values,\n        id: timing.id,\n      })\n\n      if (result.success) {\n        toast({\n          title: \"Iqamah timing updated\",\n          description: \"Iqamah timing has been updated successfully.\",\n        })\n        if (onSuccess) onSuccess()\n      } else {\n        toast({\n          title: \"Error\",\n          description: \"Failed to update Iqamah timing.\",\n          variant: \"destructive\",\n        })\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"Error\",\n        description: \"An unexpected error occurred.\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      })\n    } finally {\n      setIsSubmitting(false)\n    }\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\"\nimport { RefreshCw, Plus, Settings, Bell, Upload } from \"lucide-react\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/tabs\"\nimport { Switch } from \"@/components/ui/switch\"\nimport { fetchIqamahTimings, fetchPrayerCalculationSettings, fetchPrayerTimings } from \"@/lib/actions/prayer-times\"\nimport { PrayerCalculationSettings } from \"./prayer-calculation-settings\"\nimport { IqamahTimingsTable } from \"./iqamah-timings-table\"\nimport { AddIqamahTimingForm } from \"./add-iqamah-timing-form\"\nimport { useToast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/dialog\"\nimport { MonthlyPrayerTimes } from \"./monthly-prayer-times\"\nimport { useRouter, useSearchParams } from \"next/navigation\"\nimport { getUserMasjid } from \"@/lib/actions/masjid\"\nimport { Masjid } from \"@prisma/client\"\nimport { UploadIqamahTimings } from \"./upload-iqamah-timings\"",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function IqamahTimingsTable({ timings, loading, onRefresh, masjidId = \"\" }: IqamahTimingsTableProps) {\n...\nexport function IqamahTimingsTable({ timings, loading, onRefresh, masjidId = \"\" }: IqamahTimingsTableProps) {\n  const [sortOrder, setSortOrder] = useState\u003c\"asc\" | \"desc\"\u003e(\"desc\")\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  const handleDuplicate = async (timing: any) =\u003e {\n    try {\n      const result = await duplicateIqamahTiming(timing.id)\n\n      if (result.success) {\n        toast({\n          title: \"Iqamah timing duplicated\",\n          description: \"The Iqamah timing has been duplicated successfully.\",\n        })\n        onRefresh()\n      } else {\n        toast({\n          title: \"Error\",\n          description: \"Failed to duplicate Iqamah timing.\",\n          variant: \"destructive\",\n        })\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"Error\",\n        description: \"An unexpected error occurred.\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      })\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      \u003cdiv className=\"flex justify-center items-center py-8\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-[#550C18]\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n    )\n  }\n\n  if (timings.length === 0) {\n    return (\n      \u003cdiv className=\"text-center py-8\"\u003e\n        \u003cp className=\"text-[#3A3A3A]/70\"\u003eNo Iqamah timings found. Add your first timing.\u003c/p\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n    )\n  }",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  const handleDuplicate = async (timing: any) =\u003e {\n    try {\n      const result = await duplicateIqamahTiming(timing.id)\n\n      if (result.success) {\n        toast({\n          title: \"Iqamah timing duplicated\",\n          description: \"The Iqamah timing has been duplicated successfully.\",\n        })\n        onRefresh()\n      } else {\n        toast({\n          title: \"Error\",\n          description: \"Failed to duplicate Iqamah timing.\",\n          variant: \"destructive\",\n        })\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"Error\",\n        description: \"An unexpected error occurred.\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      })\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      \u003cdiv className=\"flex justify-center items-center py-8\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-[#550C18]\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n    )\n  }\n\n  if (timings.length === 0) {\n    return (\n      \u003cdiv className=\"text-center py-8\"\u003e\n        \u003cp className=\"text-[#3A3A3A]/70\"\u003eNo Iqamah timings found. Add your first timing.\u003c/p\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n    )\n  }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function IqamahTimingsTable({ timings, loading, onRefresh, masjidId = \"\" }: IqamahTimingsTableProps) {\n...\nexport function IqamahTimingsTable({ timings, loading, onRefresh, masjidId = \"\" }: IqamahTimingsTableProps) {\n  const [sortOrder, setSortOrder] = useState\u003c\"asc\" | \"desc\"\u003e(\"desc\")\n\n          ...\n\n          \u003cTableBody\u003e\n            {sortedTimings.map((timing) =\u003e (\n              \u003cTableRow key={timing.id}\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell className=\"font-medium\"\u003e{format(new Date(timing.changeDate), \"MM/dd/yyyy\")}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell\u003e{timing.fajr}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell\u003e{timing.dhuhr}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell\u003e{timing.asr}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell\u003e{timing.maghrib === \"0\" ? \"Sunset\" : timing.maghrib}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell\u003e{timing.isha}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell\u003e{timing.jumuahI || \"-\"}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell\u003e{timing.jumuahII || \"-\"}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell\u003e{timing.jumuahIII || \"-\"}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                \u003cTableCell className=\"text-right\"\u003e\n                  \u003cDropdownMenu\u003e",

     \u003cUpload className=\"h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n                        Upload CSV\n                      \u003c/Button\u003e\n                    \u003c/DialogTrigger\u003e\n handleRefresh()\n                        }}\n                        onCancel={() =\u003e setOpenUploadDialog(false)}\n                      /\u003e\n                    \u003c/DialogContent\u003e\n                  \u003c/Dialog\u003e\n                  \u003cDialog open={openAddDialog} onOpenChange={setOpenAddDialog}\u003e\n                    \u003cDialogTrigger asChild\u003e\n <tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="codebase_search"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **codebase_search**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent**_

I see the issue. In the `prayer-times-client.tsx` file, the `lastIqamah` is being passed incorrectly:

```typescript
<AddIqamahTimingForm
  masjidId={masjidId}
  lastIqamah={iqamahTimings[-1] || null}
  onSuccess={() => {
    setOpenAddDialog(false)
    handleRefresh()
  }}
/>
```

The problem is that `iqamahTimings[-1]` is not the correct way to get the last element in JavaScript. Let me fix this:


_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file** • Edit file: app/dashboard/prayer-times/prayer-times-client.tsx</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 1, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -310,5 +310,5 @@
                        &lt;AddIqamahTimingForm
                          masjidId={masjidId}
-                         lastIqamah={iqamahTimings[-1] || null}
+                         lastIqamah={iqamahTimings.length &gt; 0 ? iqamahTimings[iqamahTimings.length - 1] : null}
                          onSuccess={() =&gt; {
                            setOpenAddDialog(false)
```

</details>

</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **edit_file**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent**_

I've fixed the issue by:

1. Properly accessing the last element of the array using `iqamahTimings[iqamahTimings.length - 1]` instead of the incorrect `iqamahTimings[-1]`
2. Adding a proper check for array length before trying to access the last element
3. Using a ternary operator to handle both cases (when there are timings and when there aren't)

Now the form should correctly pull in the last iqamah timing when adding a new one. The form will:
1. Check if there are any existing iqamah timings
2. If there are, use the last one as the default values
3. If there aren't, use the default empty values

Let me know if you're still seeing any issues!

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\nexport const createEvent = async (event: CreateEventData) =\u003e {\n  const newEvent = await prisma.event.create({\n    data: {\n      title: event.title,\n      date: event.date,\n      timeStart: event.timeStart,\n      timeEnd: event.timeEnd,\n      location: event.location,\n      description: event.description,\n      type: event.type,\n    },\n  });\n  return newEvent;\n};",
        "detailedLines": [

 \u003cFormLabel className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\u003e\n                      \u003cBuilding2 className=\"h-4 w-4 text-[#550C18]\" /\u003e\n                      Masjid Name\n                    \u003c/FormLabel\u003e\n                    \u003cFormControl\u003e\n                      \u003cInput\n                        placeholder=\"Enter masjid name\"\n                        {...field}\n  \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-[#3A3A3A]/70 mb-2\"\u003e\n                    Drag and drop your file here, or click to browse\n                  \u003c/p\u003e\n                  \u003cInput className=\"border-[#550C18]/20 text-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#550C18]/5\"\n                    onClick={() =\u003e\n                      document.getElementById(\"content-file\").click()\n                    }\n                  \u003e\n                    Browse Files\n                  \u003c/Button\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"border-[#550C18]/20 focus:border-[#550C18] focus:ring-[#550C18]\"\n                /\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport default function EventsPage() {\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const masjidId = useSearchParams().get(\"masjidId\") || \"\";\n  const [events, setEvents] = useState\u003cEvent[]\u003e([]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const fetchEvents = async () =\u003e {\n      const events = await getEvents(masjidId);\n      setEvents(events);\n    };\n    fetchEvents();\n  }, []);\n\n  const filteredEvents = events.filter(\n    (event) =\u003e\n      event.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\n      event.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\n      event.location.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())\n  );\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e\n      \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-4\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv\u003e\n          \u003ch2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-[#550C18]\"\u003eEvents\u003c/h2\u003e\n          \u003cp className=\"text-[#3A3A3A]/70\"\u003e\n            Manage and schedule events for your masjid\n          \u003c/p\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport default function EventsPage() {\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const masjidId = useSearchParams().get(\"masjidId\") || \"\";\n  const [events, setEvents] = useState\u003cEvent[]\u003e([]);\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    const fetchEvents = async () =\u003e {\n      const events = await getEvents(masjidId);\n      setEvents(events);\n    };\n    fetchEvents();\n  }, []);\n\n  const filteredEvents = events.filter(\n    (event) =\u003e\n      event.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\n      event.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\n      event.location.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())\n  );\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e\n      \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-4\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv\u003e\n          \u003ch2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-[#550C18]\"\u003eEvents\u003c/h2\u003e\n          \u003cp className=\"text-[#3A3A3A]/70\"\u003e\n            Manage and schedule events for your masjid\n          \u003c/p\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function CreateMasjidForm({ isOpen, onClose, onSuccess }: CreateMasjidFormProps) {\n...\nexport function CreateMasjidForm({ isOpen, onClose, onSuccess }: CreateMasjidFormProps) {\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)\n\n              ...\n\n              {/*       \u003cFormMessage /\u003e */}\n              {/*     \u003c/FormItem\u003e */}\n              {/*   )} */}\n              {/* /\u003e */}\n\n              \u003cFormField\n                control={form.control}\n                name=\"description\"\n                render={({ field }) =\u003e (\n                  \u003cFormItem\u003e\n                    \u003cFormLabel\u003eDescription (Optional)\u003c/FormLabel\u003e\n                    \u003cFormControl\u003e\n                      \u003cTextarea\n                        placeholder=\"Brief description of your masjid\"\n                        className=\"resize-none border-[#550C18]/20 focus:border-[#550C18] focus:ring-[#550C18]\"\n                        {...field}\n                      /\u003e\n                    \u003c/FormControl\u003e\n                    \u003cFormMessage /\u003e\n                  \u003c/FormItem\u003e\n                )}\n              /\u003e\n\n              \u003cAlertDialogFooter className=\"pt-4 border-t border-gray-100\"\u003e\n                \u003cButton\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  variant=\"outline\"\n                  onClick={onClose}\n                  disabled={isLoading}\n                  className=\"border-[#550C18]/20 text-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#550C18]/5\"\n                \u003e\n                  Cancel\n                \u003c/Button\u003e\n                \u003cButton type=\"submit\" className=\"bg-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#78001A] text-white\" disabled={isLoading}\u003e\n                  {isLoading ? (\n                    \u003c\u003e\n                      \u003cLoader2 className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin\" /\u003e\n                      Creating...\n                    \u003c/\u003e\n                  ) : (\n                    \"Create Masjid\"\n                  )}\n                \u003c/Button\u003e\n              \u003c/AlertDialogFooter\u003e\n            \u003c/form\u003e\n          \u003c/Form\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/AlertDialogContent\u003e\n  )\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\"\nimport { zodResolver } from \"@hookform/resolvers/zod\"\nimport { useForm } from \"react-hook-form\"\nimport * as z from \"zod\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogTitle } from \"@/components/ui/dialog\"\nimport { Form, FormControl, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormMessage } from \"@/components/ui/form\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Textarea } from \"@/components/ui/textarea\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/hooks/use-toast\"\nimport { Building2, Loader2, MapPin, Home, MapIcon as City, Map } from \"lucide-react\"\nimport { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from \"@/components/ui/select\"\nimport { OpenStreetMapAddressAutocomplete } from \"./openstreetmap-address-autocomplete\"\nimport { createMasjid } from \"@/lib/actions/masjid\"\nimport { AlertDialog, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogTitle } from \"../ui/alert-dialog\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\n\nconst formSchema = z.object({\n  name: z.string().min(2, {\n    message: \"Masjid name must be at least 2 characters.\",\n  }),\n  address: z.string().min(5, {\n    message: \"Address must be at least 5 characters.\",\n  }),\n  city: z.string().min(2, {\n    message: \"City is required.\",\n  }),\n  state: z.string().min(2, {\n    message: \"State is required.\",\n  }),\n  zipCode: z.string().min(5, {\n    message: \"Zip code must be at least 5 characters.\",\n  }),\n  country: z.string().min(2, {\n    message: \"Country is required.\",\n  }),\n  description: z.string().optional(),\n  latitude: z.number().optional(),\n  longitude: z.number().optional(),\n})\n\ninterface CreateMasjidFormProps {\n  isOpen: boolean\n  onClose: () =\u003e void\n  onSuccess: () =\u003e void\n}",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\"\nimport { zodResolver } from \"@hookform/resolvers/zod\"\nimport { useForm } from \"react-hook-form\"\nimport * as z from \"zod\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogTitle } from \"@/components/ui/dialog\"\nimport { Form, FormControl, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormMessage } from \"@/components/ui/form\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Textarea } from \"@/components/ui/textarea\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/hooks/use-toast\"\nimport { Building2, Loader2, MapPin, Home, MapIcon as City, Map } from \"lucide-react\"\nimport { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from \"@/components/ui/select\"\nimport { OpenStreetMapAddressAutocomplete } from \"./openstreetmap-address-autocomplete\"\nimport { createMasjid } from \"@/lib/actions/masjid\"\nimport { AlertDialog, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogTitle } from \"../ui/alert-dialog\"\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\"\n\nconst formSchema = z.object({\n  name: z.string().min(2, {\n    message: \"Masjid name must be at least 2 characters.\",\n  }),\n  address: z.string().min(5, {\n    message: \"Address must be at least 5 characters.\",\n  }),\n  city: z.string().min(2, {\n    message: \"City is required.\",\n  }),\n  state: z.string().min(2, {\n    message: \"State is required.\",\n  }),\n  zipCode: z.string().min(5, {\n    message: \"Zip code must be at least 5 characters.\",\n  }),\n  country: z.string().min(2, {\n    message: \"Country is required.\",\n  }),\n  description: z.string().optional(),\n  latitude: z.number().optional(),\n  longitude: z.number().optional(),\n})\n\ninterface CreateMasjidFormProps {\n  isOpen: boolean\n  onClose: () =\u003e void\n  onSuccess: () =\u003e void\n}",
