```json
        "originalContents": "\n  \n  return (\n    \u003cDialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}\u003e\n      \u003cDialogContent className=\"sm:max-w-[425px] border-1 border-[#78001A]\"\u003e\n        \u003cDialogHeader\u003e\n          \u003cDialogTitle className=\"text-xl font-semibold\"\u003eUpdate {getPrayerName(prayerTime.prayer)} Time\u003c/DialogTitle\u003e\n          \u003cDialogDescription\u003e{formatDate(prayerTime.date)}\u003c/DialogDescription\u003e\n        \u003c/DialogHeader\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"grid gap-4 py-4\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\u003e\n            \u003cInput value={hours} onChange={(e) =\u003e setHours(e.target.value)} className=\"w-16 text-center\" /\u003e\n            \u003cspan className=\"text-gray-500\"\u003e:\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cInput value={minutes} onChange={(e) =\u003e setMinutes(e.target.value)} className=\"w-16 text-center\" /\u003e\n            \u003cSelect value={period} onValueChange={(val) =\u003e setPeriod(val as \"AM\" | \"PM\")}\u003e\n              \u003cSelectTrigger className=\"w-[80px]\"\u003e\n                \u003cSelectValue placeholder=\"AM/PM\" /\u003e\n              \u003c/SelectTrigger\u003e\n              \u003cSelectContent\u003e\n                \u003cSelectItem value=\"AM\"\u003eAM\u003c/SelectItem\u003e\n                \u003cSelectItem value=\"PM\"\u003ePM\u003c/SelectItem\u003e\n              \u003c/SelectContent\u003e\n            \u003c/Select\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cDialogFooter\u003e\n          \u003cButton variant=\"outline\" onClick={() =\u003e onOpenChange(false)}\u003e\n            Cancel\n          \u003c/Button\u003e\n          \u003cButton onClick={handleSubmit} className=\"bg-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#78001A] text-white\" disabled={isSubmitting}\u003e\n            {isSubmitting ? (\n              \u003c\u003e\n                \u003cLoader2 className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin\" /\u003e\n                Saving...\n              \u003c/\u003e\n            ) : (\n              \"Save\"\n            )}\n          \u003c/Button\u003e\n        \u003c/DialogFooter\u003e\n      \u003c/DialogContent\u003e\n    \u003c/Dialog\u003e\n  )\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n          \u003cDialogContent className=\"sm:max-w-[525px]\"\u003e\n            \u003cDialogHeader\u003e\n              \u003cDialogTitle\u003eUpload New Content\u003c/DialogTitle\u003e\n              \u003cDialogDescription\u003e\n                Add new content to your masjid's digital library.\n              \u003c/DialogDescription\u003e\n            \u003c/DialogHeader\u003e\n            \u003cdiv className=\"grid gap-4 py-4\"\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"grid gap-2\"\u003e\n                \u003cLabel htmlFor=\"content-title\"\u003eTitle\u003c/Label\u003e\n                \u003cInput id=\"content-title\" placeholder=\"Enter content title\" /\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"grid gap-2\"\u003e\n                \u003cLabel htmlFor=\"content-type\"\u003eContent Type\u003c/Label\u003e\n                \u003cselect\n                  id=\"content-type\"\n                  className=\"w-full rounded-md border border-[#550C18]/20 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-[#550C18] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#550C18]\"\n                \u003e\n                  \u003coption value=\"document\"\u003eDocument\u003c/option\u003e\n                  \u003coption value=\"image\"\u003eImage\u003c/option\u003e\n                  \u003coption value=\"video\"\u003eVideo\u003c/option\u003e\n                  \u003coption value=\"audio\"\u003eAudio\u003c/option\u003e\n                \u003c/select\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport function EditPrayerTimeDialog({\n  open,\n  onOpenChange,\n  prayerTime,\n  masjidId,\n  onSuccess,\n}: EditPrayerTimeDialogProps) {\n  const [hours, setHours] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"12\")\n  const [minutes, setMinutes] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"00\")\n  const [period, setPeriod] = useState\u003c\"AM\" | \"PM\"\u003e(\"AM\")\n  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)\n  const { toast } = useToast()\n\n  // Parse the time when the dialog opens\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (open \u0026\u0026 prayerTime.time) {\n      // Convert the time to a Date object if it's a string\n      const timeDate = typeof prayerTime.time === 'string' \n        ? new Date(&#96;2000-01-01T${prayerTime.time}&#96;)\n        : new Date(prayerTime.time);\n\n      // Format the time in 12-hour format\n      const hours = timeDate.getHours();\n      const minutes = timeDate.getMinutes();\n      \n      // Convert to 12-hour format\n      const period = hours \u003e= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';\n      const hours12 = hours % 12 || 12;\n      \n      setHours(hours12.toString().padStart(2, '0'));\n      setMinutes(minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0'));\n      setPeriod(period);\n    }\n  }, [open, prayerTime.time])\n\n  const formatDate = (dateString: string) =\u003e {\n    if (!dateString) return \"\"\n    const date = new Date(dateString)\n    return date.toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n      weekday: \"short\",\n      month: \"short\",\n      day: \"numeric\",\n      year: \"numeric\",\n    })\n  }\n\n  const getPrayerName = (prayer: string) =\u003e {\n    const prayerNames = {\n      fajr: \"Fajr\",\n      sunrise: \"Sunrise\",\n      dhuhr: \"Dhuhr\",\n      asr: \"Asr\",\n      maghrib: \"Maghrib\",\n      isha: \"Isha\",\n    }\n    return prayerNames[prayer as keyof typeof prayerNames] || prayer\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport function EditPrayerTimeDialog({\n  open,\n  onOpenChange,\n  prayerTime,\n  masjidId,\n  onSuccess,\n}: EditPrayerTimeDialogProps) {\n  const [hours, setHours] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"12\")\n  const [minutes, setMinutes] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"00\")\n  const [period, setPeriod] = useState\u003c\"AM\" | \"PM\"\u003e(\"AM\")\n  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false)\n  const { toast } = useToast()\n\n  // Parse the time when the dialog opens\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (open \u0026\u0026 prayerTime.time) {\n      // Convert the time to a Date object if it's a string\n      const timeDate = typeof prayerTime.time === 'string' \n        ? new Date(&#96;2000-01-01T${prayerTime.time}&#96;)\n        : new Date(prayerTime.time);\n\n      // Format the time in 12-hour format\n      const hours = timeDate.getHours();\n      const minutes = timeDate.getMinutes();\n      \n      // Convert to 12-hour format\n      const period = hours \u003e= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';\n      const hours12 = hours % 12 || 12;\n      \n      setHours(hours12.toString().padStart(2, '0'));\n      setMinutes(minutes.toString().padStart(2, '0'));\n      setPeriod(period);\n    }\n  }, [open, prayerTime.time])\n\n  const formatDate = (dateString: string) =\u003e {\n    if (!dateString) return \"\"\n    const date = new Date(dateString)\n    return date.toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n      weekday: \"short\",\n      month: \"short\",\n      day: \"numeric\",\n      year: \"numeric\",\n    })\n  }\n\n  const getPrayerName = (prayer: string) =\u003e {\n    const prayerNames = {\n      fajr: \"Fajr\",\n      sunrise: \"Sunrise\",\n      dhuhr: \"Dhuhr\",\n      asr: \"Asr\",\n      maghrib: \"Maghrib\",\n      isha: \"Isha\",\n    }\n    return prayerNames[prayer as keyof typeof prayerNames] || prayer\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Event {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  title       String\n  date        DateTime\n  timeStart   DateTime\n  timeEnd     DateTime\n  location    String\n  description String\n  type        String   // prayer, education, community, youth, etc.\n  tagColor    String   // blue-500, green-500, purple-500, orange-500, gray-500\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n   \n  masjid      Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([masjidId])\n}\n\nmodel User {\n  id            String    @id\n  name          String\n  email         String\n  emailVerified Boolean\n  image         String?\n  createdAt     DateTime\n  updatedAt     DateTime\n  sessions      Session[]\n  accounts      Account[]\n  masjids       Masjid[]  @relation(\"MasjidUsers\")\n  admin         Boolean   @default(false)\n  role          String    @default(\"user\")\n\n  MyMasjid         Masjid[]\n  CheckoutSessions CheckoutSessions[]\n  Orders           Orders[]\n  MizanTv          MizanTv[]\n\n  stripeCustomerId String?\n\n  @@unique([email])\n  @@map(\"user\")\n}\n\nmodel Session {\n  id        String   @id\n  expiresAt DateTime\n  token     String\n  createdAt DateTime\n  updatedAt DateTime\n  ipAddress String?\n  userAgent String?\n  userId    String\n  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n\n  @@unique([token])\n  @@map(\"session\")\n}\n\nmodel Account {\n  id                    String    @id\n  accountId             String\n  providerId            String\n  userId                String\n  user                  User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  accessToken           String?\n  refreshToken          String?\n  idToken               String?\n  accessTokenExpiresAt  DateTime?\n  refreshTokenExpiresAt DateTime?\n  scope                 String?\n  password              String?\n  createdAt             DateTime\n  updatedAt             DateTime\n\n  @@map(\"account\")\n}\n\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "model Event {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  title       String\n  date        DateTime\n  timeStart   DateTime\n  timeEnd     DateTime\n  location    String\n  description String\n  type        String   // prayer, education, community, youth, etc.\n  tagColor    String   // blue-500, green-500, purple-500, orange-500, gray-500\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n   \n  masjid      Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([masjidId])\n}\n\nmodel User {\n  id            String    @id\n  name          String\n  email         String\n  emailVerified Boolean\n  image         String?\n  createdAt     DateTime\n  updatedAt     DateTime\n  sessions      Session[]\n  accounts      Account[]\n  masjids       Masjid[]  @relation(\"MasjidUsers\")\n  admin         Boolean   @default(false)\n  role          String    @default(\"user\")\n\n  MyMasjid         Masjid[]\n  CheckoutSessions CheckoutSessions[]\n  Orders           Orders[]\n  MizanTv          MizanTv[]\n\n  stripeCustomerId String?\n\n  @@unique([email])\n  @@map(\"user\")\n}\n\nmodel Session {\n  id        String   @id\n  expiresAt DateTime\n  token     String\n  createdAt DateTime\n  updatedAt DateTime\n  ipAddress String?\n  userAgent String?\n  userId    String\n  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n\n  @@unique([token])\n  @@map(\"session\")\n}\n\nmodel Account {\n  id                    String    @id\n  accountId             String\n  providerId            String\n  userId                String\n  user                  User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  accessToken           String?\n  refreshToken          String?\n  idToken               String?\n  accessTokenExpiresAt  DateTime?\n  refreshTokenExpiresAt DateTime?\n  scope                 String?\n  password              String?\n  createdAt             DateTime\n  updatedAt             DateTime\n\n  @@map(\"account\")\n}\n\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export function EditPrayerTimeDialog({\n...\nexport function EditPrayerTimeDialog({\n  open,\n  onOpenChange,\n  prayerTime,\n  masjidId,\n  onSuccess,\n}: EditPrayerTimeDialogProps) {\n  const [hours, setHours] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"12\")\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  const handleSubmit = async () =\u003e {\n    setIsSubmitting(true)\n    try {\n      const formattedTime = &#96;${hours}:${minutes} ${period}&#96;\n\n      const result = await updatePrayerTime(prayerTime.id, prayerTime.prayer, formattedTime)\n\n      if (result.success) {\n        toast({\n          title: \"Success\",\n          description: \"Prayer time updated successfully\",\n        })\n        onSuccess()\n        onOpenChange(false)\n      } else {\n        toast({\n          title: \"Error\",\n          description: result.error || \"Failed to update prayer time\",\n          variant: \"destructive\",\n        })\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"Error\",\n        description: \"An unexpected error occurred\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      })\n    } finally {\n      setIsSubmitting(false)\n    }\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\";\n\nexport const getEvents = async (masjidId: string) =\u003e {\n  const events = await prisma.event.findMany({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n    },\n    orderBy: {\n      date: \"asc\",\n    },\n    include: {\n      masjid: true,\n    },\n  });\n  return events || [];\n};",
```

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,276 @@
- 
+ "use client"
+ 
+ import { useState } from "react"
+ import { zodResolver } from "@hookform/resolvers/zod"
+ import { useForm } from "react-hook-form"
+ import * as z from "zod"
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
+ import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from "@/components/ui/dialog"
+ import { Form, FormControl, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormMessage } from "@/components/ui/form"
+ import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"
+ import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea"
+ import { Loader2, Plus } from "lucide-react"
+ import { createEvent } from "@/lib/actions/events"
+ import { useToast } from "@/components/ui/use-toast"
+ import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"
+ 
+ const formSchema = z.object({
+   title: z.string().min(2, {
+     message: "Event title must be at least 2 characters.",
+   }),
+   date: z.string().min(1, {
+     message: "Date is required.",
+   }),
+   timeStart: z.string().min(1, {
+     message: "Start time is required.",
+   }),
+   timeEnd: z.string().min(1, {
+     message: "End time is required.",
+   }),
+   location: z.string().min(2, {
+     message: "Location must be at least 2 characters.",
+   }),
+   description: z.string().min(2, {
+     message: "Description must be at least 2 characters.",
+   }),
+   type: z.string().min(2, {
+     message: "Event type is required.",
+   }),
+   tagColor: z.string().min(1, {
+     message: "Tag color is required.",
+   }),
+ })
+ 
+ interface CreateEventFormProps {
+   isOpen: boolean
+   onClose: () =&gt; void
+   onSuccess: () =&gt; void
+   masjidId: string
+ }
+ 
+ export function CreateEventForm({ isOpen, onClose, onSuccess, masjidId }: CreateEventFormProps) {
+   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
+   const { toast } = useToast()
+   const router = useRouter()
+ 
+   const form = useForm&lt;z.infer&lt;typeof formSchema&gt;&gt;({
+     resolver: zodResolver(formSchema),
+     defaultValues: {
+       title: "",
+       date: "",
+       timeStart: "",
+       timeEnd: "",
+       location: "",
+       description: "",
+       type: "",
+       tagColor: "#550C18",
+     },
+   })
+ 
+   async function onSubmit(values: z.infer&lt;typeof formSchema&gt;) {
+     setIsLoading(true)
+     try {
+       const eventData = {
+         ...values,
+         masjidId,
+         date: new Date(values.date),
+         timeStart: new Date(&#96;2000-01-01T${values.timeStart}&#96;),
+         timeEnd: new Date(&#96;2000-01-01T${values.timeEnd}&#96;),
+       }
+ 
+       await createEvent(eventData)
+       
+       toast({
+         title: "Success",
+         description: "Event created successfully",
+       })
+       
+       onSuccess()
+       onClose()
+       form.reset()
+     } catch (error) {
+       toast({
+         title: "Error",
+         description: "Failed to create event",
+         variant: "destructive",
+       })
+     } finally {
+       setIsLoading(false)
+     }
+   }
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;Dialog open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}&gt;
+       &lt;DialogContent className="sm:max-w-[525px]"&gt;
+         &lt;DialogHeader&gt;
+           &lt;DialogTitle&gt;Add New Event&lt;/DialogTitle&gt;
+           &lt;DialogDescription&gt;
+             Create a new event for your masjid. Fill in the details below.
+           &lt;/DialogDescription&gt;
+         &lt;/DialogHeader&gt;
+         &lt;Form {...form}&gt;
+           &lt;form onSubmit={form.handleSubmit(onSubmit)} className="space-y-4"&gt;
+             &lt;FormField
+               control={form.control}
+               name="title"
+               render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                 &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                   &lt;FormLabel&gt;Event Title&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                   &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                     &lt;Input placeholder="Enter event title" {...field} /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                   &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                 &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+               )}
+             /&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;FormField
+               control={form.control}
+               name="date"
+               render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                 &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                   &lt;FormLabel&gt;Date&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                   &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                     &lt;Input type="date" {...field} /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                   &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                 &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+               )}
+             /&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4"&gt;
+               &lt;FormField
+                 control={form.control}
+                 name="timeStart"
+                 render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                   &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                     &lt;FormLabel&gt;Start Time&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                     &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                       &lt;Input type="time" {...field} /&gt;
+                     &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                     &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+                 )}
+               /&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;FormField
+                 control={form.control}
+                 name="timeEnd"
+                 render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                   &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                     &lt;FormLabel&gt;End Time&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                     &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                       &lt;Input type="time" {...field} /&gt;
+                     &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                     &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+                 )}
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;FormField
+               control={form.control}
+               name="location"
+               render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                 &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                   &lt;FormLabel&gt;Location&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                   &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                     &lt;Input placeholder="Enter event location" {...field} /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                   &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                 &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+               )}
+             /&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4"&gt;
+               &lt;FormField
+                 control={form.control}
+                 name="type"
+                 render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                   &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                     &lt;FormLabel&gt;Event Type&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                     &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                       &lt;Input placeholder="Enter event type" {...field} /&gt;
+                     &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                     &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+                 )}
+               /&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;FormField
+                 control={form.control}
+                 name="tagColor"
+                 render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                   &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                     &lt;FormLabel&gt;Tag Color&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                     &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                       &lt;Input type="color" {...field} /&gt;
+                     &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                     &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+                 )}
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2"&gt;
+               &lt;p className="text-gray-500 text-sm mt-2"&gt;Our Defaults:&lt;/p&gt;
+               {["prayer", "education", "community", "youth", "other"].map((type) =&gt; (
+                 &lt;Button
+                   key={type}
+                   variant="outline"
+                   size="sm"
+                   onClick={() =&gt; form.setValue("type", type)}
+                   className="capitalize"
+                 &gt;
+                   {type}
+                 &lt;/Button&gt;
+               ))}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;FormField
+               control={form.control}
+               name="description"
+               render={({ field }) =&gt; (
+                 &lt;FormItem&gt;
+                   &lt;FormLabel&gt;Description&lt;/FormLabel&gt;
+                   &lt;FormControl&gt;
+                     &lt;Textarea
+                       placeholder="Enter event description"
+                       className="min-h-[100px]"
+                       {...field}
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/FormControl&gt;
+                   &lt;FormMessage /&gt;
+                 &lt;/FormItem&gt;
+               )}
+             /&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;DialogFooter&gt;
+               &lt;Button
+                 type="button"
+                 variant="outline"
+                 onClick={onClose}
+                 disabled={isLoading}
+               &gt;
+                 Cancel
+               &lt;/Button&gt;
+               &lt;Button type="submit" disabled={isLoading}&gt;
+                 {isLoading ? (
+                   &lt;&gt;
+                     &lt;Loader2 className="mr-2 h-4 w-4 animate-spin" /&gt;
+                     Creating...
+                   &lt;/&gt;
+                 ) : (
+                   &lt;&gt;
+                     &lt;Plus className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+                     Create Event
+                   &lt;/&gt;
+                 )}
+               &lt;/Button&gt;
+             &lt;/DialogFooter&gt;
+           &lt;/form&gt;
+         &lt;/Form&gt;
+       &lt;/DialogContent&gt;
+     &lt;/Dialog&gt;
+   )
+ } 
```

_**Agent**_

I've made the following changes to implement the event creation form using `react-hook-form`:

1. Created a new component `CreateEventForm` in `components/dashboard/create-event-form.tsx` that:
   - Uses `react-hook-form` with Zod validation
   - Handles form submission and error states
   - Provides proper form field validation and error messages
   - Includes loading states and success/error toasts
   - Maintains the same UI design as before

2. Updated the events page (`app/dashboard/events/page.tsx`) to:
   - Remove the old form implementation
   - Use the new `CreateEventForm` component
   - Add state management for the form dialog
   - Update the event list to properly display dates and times
   - Refresh the events list after successful creation

The new implementation provides several benefits:
- Form validation with clear error messages
- Type safety with Zod schema
- Better state management
- Proper handling of loading states
- Consistent error handling
- Better user feedback with toasts

The form maintains all the previous functionality while adding these improvements. Users can still:
- Create new events with all required fields
- Select from predefined event types
- Choose custom tag colors
- See proper date and time formatting in the event list

Would you like me to make any adjustments to the implementation?

_**Agent**_

I've made the following changes to convert the event creation form into a dedicated page:

1. Created a new page at `app/dashboard/events/new/page.tsx` that:
   - Has a back button to return to the events list
   - Shows a proper page header
   - Contains the form in a clean layout
   - Handles navigation and success states

2. Modified the `CreateEventForm` component to:
   - Remove the Dialog wrapper
   - Use a two-column layout for better space utilization
   - Improve the form's visual hierarchy
   - Keep all the validation and functionality

3. Updated the events page to:
   - Remove the dialog and form component
   - Add a link to the new event creation page
   - Fix the Event type definition to resolve the linter error

The new implementation provides several benefits:
- More screen space for the form and editor
- Better navigation flow
- Cleaner code organization
- Improved user experience with dedicated pages
- Maintains all the existing functionality

```diff
@@ -45,3 +46,27 @@
    return newEvent;
  };
+ 
+ export const updateEvent = async (id: string, event: Partial&lt;CreateEventData&gt;) =&gt; {
+   const updatedEvent = await prisma.event.update({
+     where: { id },
+     data: {
+       title: event.title,
+       date: event.date,
+       timeStart: event.timeStart,
+       timeEnd: event.timeEnd,
+       location: event.location,
+       description: event.description,
+       type: event.type,
+       tagColor: event.tagColor,
+     },
+   });
+   return updatedEvent;
+ };
+ 
+ export const deleteEvent = async (id: string) =&gt; {
+   await prisma.event.delete({
+     where: { id },
+   });
+   return { success: true };
+ };
  
```

Now, let's create an edit event page:


_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file** • Edit file: app/dashboard/events/[id]/edit/page.tsx</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 83, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,83 @@
- 
+ "use client"
+ 
+ import { useEffect, useState } from "react"
+ import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
+ import { ArrowLeft } from "lucide-react"
+ import { CreateEventForm } from "@/components/dashboard/create-event-form"
+ import { getEvents } from "@/lib/actions/events"
+ 
+ type Event = {
+   id: string;
+   title: string;
+   date: Date;
+   timeStart: Date;
+   timeEnd: Date;
+   location: string;
+   description: string;
+   type: string;
+   tagColor: string;
+   masjidId: string;
+   createdAt: Date;
+   updatedAt: Date;
+ };
+ 
+ export default function EditEventPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) {
+   const router = useRouter()
+   const [event, setEvent] = useState&lt;Event | null&gt;(null)
+   const masjidId = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("masjidId") || ""
+ 
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     const fetchEvent = async () =&gt; {
+       const events = await getEvents(masjidId)
+       const event = events.find((e) =&gt; e.id === params.id)
+       if (event) {
+         setEvent(event)
+       }
+     }
+     fetchEvent()
+   }, [masjidId, params.id])
+ 
+   if (!event) {
+     return (
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center h-[50vh]"&gt;
+         &lt;div className="text-center"&gt;
+           &lt;h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-[#550C18]"&gt;Loading...&lt;/h2&gt;
+           &lt;p className="text-[#3A3A3A]/70"&gt;Please wait while we load the event details.&lt;/p&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     )
+   }
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-4 justify-between"&gt;
+         &lt;div&gt;
+           &lt;h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-[#550C18]"&gt;Edit Event&lt;/h2&gt;
+           &lt;p className="text-[#3A3A3A]/70"&gt;
+             Update the details of your event below
+           &lt;/p&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;Button
+           variant="outline"
+           size="md"
+           onClick={() =&gt; router.back()}
+           className="mt-auto mb-auto"
+         &gt;
+           &lt;ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" /&gt; Back
+         &lt;/Button&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;div className="bg-white rounded-lg border border-[#550C18]/10 p-6 px-20"&gt;
+         &lt;CreateEventForm
+           isOpen={true}
+           onClose={() =&gt; router.back()}
+           onSuccess={() =&gt; router.push("/dashboard/events")}
+           masjidId={masjidId}
+           initialData={event}
+           isEditMode={true}
+         /&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   )
+ } 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

_**Agent**_

I've updated the events page to include editing and deleting functionality. Here are the key changes:

1. Added imports for the delete event action, alert dialog components, and toast notifications
2. Added state management for the delete dialog and the event to be deleted
3. Implemented the `handleDelete` function that:
   - Calls the delete event action
   - Updates the local events state
   - Shows success/error toasts
   - Closes the delete dialog
4. Added click handlers for the edit and delete buttons:
   - Edit button navigates to the edit page with the event ID and masjid ID
   - Delete button opens a confirmation dialog
5. Added a confirmation dialog that:
   - Shows the event title
   - Has cancel and delete actions
   - Uses red styling for the delete button to indicate destructive action

The page now provides a complete interface for managing events, including:
- Viewing all events in a list
- Searching events
- Adding new events
- Editing existing events
- Deleting events with confirmation

The UI maintains consistency with the existing design, using the same color scheme and styling patterns. All actions have appropriate feedback through toasts and the confirmation dialog helps prevent accidental deletions.

Would you like me to make any adjustments to this implementation?

Now, let's create a new component for the Google Calendar settings modal:


_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file** • Edit file: components/dashboard/google-calendar-settings.tsx</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 102, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,102 @@
- 
+ "use client";
+ 
+ import { useState } from "react";
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+ import {
+   Dialog,
+   DialogContent,
+   DialogDescription,
+   DialogFooter,
+   DialogHeader,
+   DialogTitle,
+ } from "@/components/ui/dialog";
+ import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
+ import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
+ import { Settings } from "lucide-react";
+ import { useToast } from "@/components/ui/use-toast";
+ import { updateMasjid } from "@/lib/actions/masjids";
+ 
+ interface GoogleCalendarSettingsProps {
+   masjidId: string;
+   currentCalendarId?: string;
+ }
+ 
+ export function GoogleCalendarSettings({
+   masjidId,
+   currentCalendarId,
+ }: GoogleCalendarSettingsProps) {
+   const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);
+   const [calendarId, setCalendarId] = useState(currentCalendarId || "");
+   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
+   const { toast } = useToast();
+ 
+   const handleSave = async () =&gt; {
+     setIsLoading(true);
+     try {
+       await updateMasjid(masjidId, {
+         googleCalendarId: calendarId,
+       });
+       toast({
+         title: "Success",
+         description: "Google Calendar settings updated successfully",
+       });
+       setIsOpen(false);
+     } catch (error) {
+       toast({
+         title: "Error",
+         description: "Failed to update Google Calendar settings",
+         variant: "destructive",
+       });
+     } finally {
+       setIsLoading(false);
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;&gt;
+       &lt;Button
+         variant="outline"
+         size="icon"
+         onClick={() =&gt; setIsOpen(true)}
+         className="h-8 w-8"
+       &gt;
+         &lt;Settings className="h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+       &lt;/Button&gt;
+ 
+       &lt;Dialog open={isOpen} onOpenChange={setIsOpen}&gt;
+         &lt;DialogContent&gt;
+           &lt;DialogHeader&gt;
+             &lt;DialogTitle&gt;Google Calendar Settings&lt;/DialogTitle&gt;
+             &lt;DialogDescription&gt;
+               Connect your masjid's events to Google Calendar. Enter your Google
+               Calendar ID below.
+             &lt;/DialogDescription&gt;
+           &lt;/DialogHeader&gt;
+           &lt;div className="space-y-4 py-4"&gt;
+             &lt;div className="space-y-2"&gt;
+               &lt;Label htmlFor="calendarId"&gt;Google Calendar ID&lt;/Label&gt;
+               &lt;Input
+                 id="calendarId"
+                 placeholder="Enter your Google Calendar ID"
+                 value={calendarId}
+                 onChange={(e) =&gt; setCalendarId(e.target.value)}
+               /&gt;
+               &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 You can find your Calendar ID in your Google Calendar settings
+                 under "Calendar Settings" → "Calendar Address"
+               &lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;DialogFooter&gt;
+             &lt;Button variant="outline" onClick={() =&gt; setIsOpen(false)}&gt;
+               Cancel
+             &lt;/Button&gt;
+             &lt;Button onClick={handleSave} disabled={isLoading}&gt;
+               {isLoading ? "Saving..." : "Save"}
+             &lt;/Button&gt;
+           &lt;/DialogFooter&gt;
+         &lt;/DialogContent&gt;
+       &lt;/Dialog&gt;
+     &lt;/&gt;
+   );
+ } 
```

</details>

Now, let's create a server action to handle updating the masjid's Google Calendar settings:

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file">

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,17 @@
- 
+ "use server";
+ 
+ import { prisma } from "../db";
+ 
+ export const updateMasjid = async (
+   id: string,
+   data: {
+     googleCalendarId?: string;
+     googleCalendarCredentials?: any;
+   }
+ ) =&gt; {
+   const masjid = await prisma.masjid.update({
+     where: { id },
+     data,
+   });
+   return masjid;
+ }; 
```

I've created a complete Google Calendar integration system with the following components:

1. Updated the `Masjid` schema to include:
   - `googleCalendarId`: To store the Google Calendar ID
   - `googleCalendarCredentials`: To store OAuth credentials (if needed in the future)

2. Created a new `GoogleCalendarSettings` component that:

   - Saves the settings to the database
   - Provides feedback through toast notifications

3. Added the Google Calendar settings button to the events page next to the "Add New Event" button

4. Created a server action to handle updating the masjid's Google Calendar settings

To use this feature:
1. Click the gear icon next to "Add New Event"
2. Enter your Google Calendar ID (found in Google Calendar settings under "Calendar Settings" → "Calendar Address")
3. Click Save to store the settings

This provides a foundation for Google Calendar integration. In the future, you could extend this to:
1. Automatically sync events to Google Calendar
2. Add OAuth authentication for more secure integration
3. Allow users to choose which events to sync
4. Add two-way sync between your app and Google Calendar

_**Agent**_

I've added the following new fields to the `Event` model to support Google Calendar sync:

1. `syncToGoogleCalendar`: A boolean field that determines if the event should be synced to Google Calendar
2. `googleCalendarEventId`: Stores the ID of the corresponding event in Google Calendar for two-way sync
3. `lastSyncedAt`: Tracks when the event was last synced with Google Calendar
4. `syncStatus`: Tracks the sync status of the event ('pending', 'synced', or 'failed')

These new fields will allow you to:
- Choose which events to sync to Google Calendar
- Track the sync status of each event
- Maintain the relationship between your app's events and Google Calendar events
- Implement two-way sync by storing the Google Calendar event ID

Now you'll need to:
1. Run a database migration to apply these changes
2. Update your event creation/editing UI to include a toggle for Google Calendar sync
3. Implement the sync logic in your backend

Would you like me to help you with any of these next steps?

Now let's implement the backend logic for Google Calendar sync. First, let's create a new action file for Google Calendar operations:


_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file** • Edit file: lib/actions/google-calendar.ts</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 146, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,146 @@
- 
+ import { google } from 'googleapis';
+ import { prisma } from '@/lib/prisma';
+ import { getServerSession } from 'next-auth';
+ import { authOptions } from '@/lib/auth';
+ 
+ const oauth2Client = new google.auth.OAuth2(
+   process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID,
+   process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET,
+   process.env.GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI
+ );
+ 
+ export async function syncEventToGoogleCalendar(eventId: string) {
+   try {
+     const session = await getServerSession(authOptions);
+     if (!session?.user) {
+       throw new Error('Not authenticated');
+     }
+ 
+     const event = await prisma.event.findUnique({
+       where: { id: eventId },
+       include: { masjid: true },
+     });
+ 
+     if (!event || !event.syncToGoogleCalendar) {
+       return;
+     }
+ 
+     // Get the masjid's Google Calendar credentials
+     const masjid = await prisma.masjid.findUnique({
+       where: { id: event.masjidId },
+       select: { googleCalendarCredentials: true, googleCalendarId: true },
+     });
+ 
+     if (!masjid?.googleCalendarCredentials || !masjid.googleCalendarId) {
+       throw new Error('Google Calendar not configured for this masjid');
+     }
+ 
+     // Set up the Google Calendar client
+     const credentials = JSON.parse(masjid.googleCalendarCredentials as string);
+     oauth2Client.setCredentials(credentials);
+     const calendar = google.calendar({ version: 'v3', auth: oauth2Client });
+ 
+     // Prepare the event data
+     const startDateTime = new Date(event.date);
+     startDateTime.setHours(
+       event.timeStart.getHours(),
+       event.timeStart.getMinutes(),
+       0
+     );
+ 
+     const endDateTime = new Date(event.date);
+     endDateTime.setHours(
+       event.timeEnd.getHours(),
+       event.timeEnd.getMinutes(),
+       0
+     );
+ 
+     const calendarEvent = {
+       summary: event.title,
+       description: event.description,
+       location: event.location,
+       start: {
+         dateTime: startDateTime.toISOString(),
+         timeZone: 'UTC',
+       },
+       end: {
+         dateTime: endDateTime.toISOString(),
+         timeZone: 'UTC',
+       },
+     };
+ 
+     // If the event has a Google Calendar ID, update it; otherwise, create a new one
+     if (event.googleCalendarEventId) {
+       await calendar.events.update({
+         calendarId: masjid.googleCalendarId,
+         eventId: event.googleCalendarEventId,
+         requestBody: calendarEvent,
+       });
+     } else {
+       const response = await calendar.events.insert({
+         calendarId: masjid.googleCalendarId,
+         requestBody: calendarEvent,
+       });
+ 
+       // Update the event with the Google Calendar event ID
+       await prisma.event.update({
+         where: { id: eventId },
+         data: {
+           googleCalendarEventId: response.data.id,
+           lastSyncedAt: new Date(),
+           syncStatus: 'synced',
+         },
+       });
+     }
+ 
+     return { success: true };
+   } catch (error) {
+     console.error('Error syncing event to Google Calendar:', error);
+     
+     // Update the event's sync status to failed
+     await prisma.event.update({
+       where: { id: eventId },
+       data: {
+         syncStatus: 'failed',
+       },
+     });
+ 
+     throw error;
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ export async function deleteEventFromGoogleCalendar(eventId: string) {
+   try {
+     const event = await prisma.event.findUnique({
+       where: { id: eventId },
+       include: { masjid: true },
+     });
+ 
+     if (!event?.googleCalendarEventId) {
+       return;
+     }
+ 
+     const masjid = await prisma.masjid.findUnique({
+       where: { id: event.masjidId },
+       select: { googleCalendarCredentials: true, googleCalendarId: true },
+     });
+ 
+     if (!masjid?.googleCalendarCredentials || !masjid.googleCalendarId) {
+       return;
+     }
+ 
+     const credentials = JSON.parse(masjid.googleCalendarCredentials as string);
+     oauth2Client.setCredentials(credentials);
+     const calendar = google.calendar({ version: 'v3', auth: oauth2Client });
+ 
+     await calendar.events.delete({
+       calendarId: masjid.googleCalendarId,
+       eventId: event.googleCalendarEventId,
+     });
+ 
+     return { success: true };
+   } catch (error) {
+     console.error('Error deleting event from Google Calendar:', error);
+     throw error;
+   }
+ } 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
+ import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
+ import { syncEventToGoogleCalendar } from "@/lib/actions/google-calendar";
+ 
+ export async function POST(
+   request: Request,
+   { params }: { params: { id: string } }
+ ) {
+   try {
+     const { id } = params;
+     await syncEventToGoogleCalendar(id);
+     return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
+   } catch (error) {
+     console.error("Error syncing event to Google Calendar:", error);
+     return NextResponse.json(
+       { error: "Failed to sync event to Google Calendar" },
+       { status: 500 }
+     );
+   }
+ }
```

_**Agent**_

I've implemented the Google Calendar sync functionality with the following changes:

1. Updated the Event form component:
   - Added a toggle switch for Google Calendar sync
   - Updated the form schema to include `syncToGoogleCalendar` field
   - Added proper TypeScript types for Google Calendar fields

2. Created Google Calendar integration:
   - Added `google-calendar.ts` with functions for syncing and deleting events
   - Implemented OAuth2 authentication with Google Calendar API
   - Added proper error handling and status tracking

3. Updated event actions:
   - Modified `createEvent` and `updateEvent` to handle Google Calendar sync
   - Added automatic sync when events are created or updated
   - Added cleanup when events are deleted

4. Added a new API route:
   - Created `/api/events/[id]/sync` endpoint for manual sync
   - Added proper error handling and response formatting

The implementation includes:
- Automatic sync when events are created/updated with sync enabled
- Manual sync option through the API endpoint
- Proper error handling and status tracking
- Cleanup of Google Calendar events when deleted
- Support for updating existing Google Calendar events

To use this functionality:
1. Make sure the masjid has Google Calendar credentials configured
2. Toggle the "Sync with Google Calendar" switch when creating/editing an event
3. The event will be automatically synced to the masjid's Google Calendar
4. You can manually trigger a sync by calling the API endpoint if needed

Would you like me to explain any part of the implementation in more detail or make any adjustments?

```json
        "originalContents": "{\n  \"name\": \"my-v0-project\",\n  \"version\": \"0.1.0\",\n  \"private\": true,\n  \"scripts\": {\n    \"dev\": \"prisma generate \u0026\u0026 next dev\",\n    \"build\": \"next build\",\n    \"start\": \"next start\",\n    \"lint\": \"next lint\"\n  },\n  \"dependencies\": {\n    \"@better-auth/stripe\": \"^1.2.5\",\n    \"@hookform/resolvers\": \"^3.9.1\",\n    \"@prisma/client\": \"^6.5.0\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-accordion\": \"^1.2.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-alert-dialog\": \"^1.1.6\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-aspect-ratio\": \"^1.1.1\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-avatar\": \"^1.1.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-checkbox\": \"^1.1.3\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-collapsible\": \"^1.1.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-context-menu\": \"^2.2.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-dialog\": \"^1.1.6\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu\": \"^2.1.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-hover-card\": \"^1.1.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-label\": \"^2.1.1\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-menubar\": \"^1.1.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-navigation-menu\": \"^1.2.3\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-popover\": \"^1.1.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-progress\": \"latest\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-radio-group\": \"^1.2.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-scroll-area\": \"^1.2.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-select\": \"^2.1.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-separator\": \"^1.1.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-slider\": \"^1.2.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-slot\": \"^1.1.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-switch\": \"^1.1.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-tabs\": \"^1.1.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-toast\": \"^1.2.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-toggle\": \"^1.1.1\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-toggle-group\": \"^1.1.1\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-tooltip\": \"^1.1.8\",\n    \"@square/web-sdk\": \"^2.1.0\",\n    \"@stripe/react-stripe-js\": \"^3.6.0\",\n    \"@stripe/stripe-js\": \"^7.0.0\",\n    \"@tanstack/react-query\": \"^5.69.0\",\n    \"@tiptap/extension-code-block-lowlight\": \"^2.11.9\",\n    \"@tiptap/extension-color\": \"^2.11.9\",\n    \"@tiptap/extension-heading\": \"^2.11.9\",\n    \"@tiptap/extension-horizontal-rule\":       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';\n\nconst prismaClientSingleton = () =\u003e {\n  return new PrismaClient()\n}",

        "originalContents": "import { PrismaClient } from '@prisma/client';\n\nconst prismaClientSingleton = () =\u003e {\n  return new PrismaClient()\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "// prisma/schema.prisma\n\ngenerator client {\n  provider = \"prisma-client-js\"\n}\n\ndatasource db {\n  provider = \"postgresql\"\n  url      = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\n}\n\nmodel Masjid {\n  id          String  @id @default(cuid())\n  name        String\n  description String\n  address     String?\n  city        String\n  postal      String\n  country     String\n  email       String\n  websiteUrl  String\n  phone       String\n  googleCalendarId  String @default(\"\")\n  googleCalendarCredentials Json?\n\n  latitude        String\n  longitude       String\n  locationAddress String\n\n  logo String @default(\"https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSIC25nqru3yN9lhtoTwdBWt_u0QlOcPzw3Bw\u0026s\")\n\n  timezone  String\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n  ownerId   String\n  owner     User     @relation(fields: [ownerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  prayerTimes PrayerTime[]\n  users       User[]       @relation(\"MasjidUsers\")\n  devices     Device[]\n  themes      Theme[]\n  flyers      Flyer[]\n  events      Event[]\n  iqamahTimings IqamahTiming[]\n  prayerCalculation PrayerCalculation[]\n}\n\nmodel Device {\n  id       String @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId String\n  masjid   Masjid @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  name         String\n  location     String?\n  isActive     Boolean   @default(true)\n  lastSeen     DateTime? // for heartbeat tracking\n  registeredAt DateTime  @default(now())\n  ipAddress    String?\n\n  currentThemeId String?\n  currentTheme   Theme?  @relation(fields: [currentThemeId], references: [id])\n\n  screenLogs ScreenLog[]\n}\n\nmodel ScreenLog {\n  id       String @id @default(cuid())\n  deviceId String\n  device   Device @relation(fields: [deviceId], references: [id])\n\n  timestamp DateTime @default(now())\n  action    String // 'boot', 'refresh', 'disconnect', etc.\n  details   String?\n}\n\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "// prisma/schema.prisma\n\ngenerator client {\n  provider = \"prisma-client-js\"\n}\n\ndatasource db {\n  provider = \"postgresql\"\n  url      = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\n}\n\nmodel Masjid {\n  id          String  @id @default(cuid())\n  name        String\n  description String\n  address     String?\n  city        String\n  postal      String\n  country     String\n  email       String\n  websiteUrl  String\n  phone       String\n  googleCalendarId  String @default(\"\")\n  googleCalendarCredentials Json?\n\n  latitude        String\n  longitude       String\n  locationAddress String\n\n  logo String @default(\"https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSIC25nqru3yN9lhtoTwdBWt_u0QlOcPzw3Bw\u0026s\")\n\n  timezone  String\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n  ownerId   String\n  owner     User     @relation(fields: [ownerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  prayerTimes PrayerTime[]\n  users       User[]       @relation(\"MasjidUsers\")\n  devices     Device[]\n  themes      Theme[]\n  flyers      Flyer[]\n  events      Event[]\n  iqamahTimings IqamahTiming[]\n  prayerCalculation PrayerCalculation[]\n}\n\nmodel Device {\n  id       String @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId String\n  masjid   Masjid @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  name         String\n  location     String?\n  isActive     Boolean   @default(true)\n  lastSeen     DateTime? // for heartbeat tracking\n  registeredAt DateTime  @default(now())\n  ipAddress    String?\n\n  currentThemeId String?\n  currentTheme   Theme?  @relation(fields: [currentThemeId], references: [id])\n\n  screenLogs ScreenLog[]\n}\n\nmodel ScreenLog {\n  id       String @id @default(cuid())\n  deviceId String\n  device   Device @relation(fields: [deviceId], references: [id])\n\n  timestamp DateTime @default(now())\n  action    String // 'boot', 'refresh', 'disconnect', etc.\n  details   String?\n}\n\n",

        "originalContents": "    \"@tiptap/extension-text-style\": \"^2.11.9\",\n    \"@tiptap/extension-typography\": \"^2.11.9\",\n    \"@tiptap/extension-underline\": \"^2.11.9\",\n    \"@tiptap/pm\": \"^2.11.9\",\n    \"@tiptap/react\": \"^2.11.9\",\n    \"@tiptap/starter-kit\": \"^2.11.9\",\n    \"@types/react\": \"latest\",\n    \"@types/react-dom\": \"latest\",\n    \"adhan\": \"^4.4.3\",\n    \"autoprefixer\": \"^10.4.20\",\n    \"better-auth\": \"^1.2.3\",\n    \"class-variance-authority\": \"^0.7.1\",\n    \"clsx\": \"^2.1.1\",\n    \"cmdk\": \"1.0.4\",\n    \"date-fns\": \"4.1.0\",\n    \"date-fns-tz\": \"^3.2.0\",\n    \"embla-carousel-react\": \"8.5.1\",\n    \"framer-motion\": \"^12.5.0\",\n    \"googleapis\": \"^148.0.0\",\n    \"input-otp\": \"1.4.1\",\n    \"lowlight\": \"^3.3.0\",\n    \"lucide-react\": \"^0.454.0\",\n    \"moment\": \"^2.30.1\",\n    \"next\": \"15.2.4\",\n    \"next-themes\": \"^0.4.4\",\n    \"papaparse\": \"^5.5.2\",\n    \"react\": \"^19\",\n    \"react-day-picker\": \"8.10.1\",\n    \"react-dom\": \"^19\",\n    \"react-hook-form\": \"^7.54.1\",\n    \"react-medium-image-zoom\": \"^5.2.14\",\n    \"react-resizable-panels\": \"^2.1.7\",\n    \"recharts\": \"2.15.0\",\n    \"sonner\": \"^1.7.1\",\n    \"square\": \"^42.0.0\",\n    \"stripe\": \"^17.7.0\",\n    \"tailwind-merge\": \"^2.5.5\",\n    \"tailwindcss-animate\": \"^1.0.7\",\n    \"uuid\": \"^11.1.0\",\n    \"vaul\": \"^0.9.6\",\n    \"zod\": \"^3.24.2\",\n    \"zustand\": \"^5.0.3\"\n  },\n  \"devDependencies\": {\n    \"@types/node\": \"^22\",\n    \"@types/react\": \"^19\",\n    \"@types/react-dom\": \"^19\",\n    \"postcss\": \"^8\",\n    \"prisma\": \"^6.5.0\",\n    \"tailwindcss\": \"^3.4.17\",\n    \"typescript\": \"^5\"\n  }\n}\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Account {\n  id                    String    @id\n  accountId             String\n  providerId            String\n  userId                String\n  user                  User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  accessToken           String?\n  refreshToken          String?\n  idToken               String?\n  accessTokenExpiresAt  DateTime?\n  refreshTokenExpiresAt DateTime?\n  scope                 String?\n  password              String?\n  createdAt             DateTime\n  updatedAt             DateTime\n\n  @@map(\"account\")\n}\n\nmodel Verification {\n  id         String    @id\n  identifier String\n  value      String\n  expiresAt  DateTime\n  createdAt  DateTime?\n  updatedAt  DateTime?\n\n  @@map(\"verification\")\n}\n\nmodel CheckoutSessions {\n  id          String   @id\n  userId      String\n  user        User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  sessionId   String\n  paymentType String\n  completed   String\n  cart        String\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n}\n\nmodel Orders {\n  id              String   @id\n  userId          String\n  user            User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  stripeSessionId String?\n  status          String\n  cart            String\n  trackingNumber  String?\n  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())\n\n  MizanTv MizanTv[]\n}\n\nmodel MizanTv {\n  id         String @id\n  userId     String\n  user       User   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  orderId    String\n  order      Orders @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  accessCode String\n}\n\n",

        "originalContents": "model Account {\n  id                    String    @id\n  accountId             String\n  providerId            String\n  userId                String\n  user                  User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  accessToken           String?\n  refreshToken          String?\n  idToken               String?\n  accessTokenExpiresAt  DateTime?\n  refreshTokenExpiresAt DateTime?\n  scope                 String?\n  password              String?\n  createdAt             DateTime\n  updatedAt             DateTime\n\n  @@map(\"account\")\n}\n\nmodel Verification {\n  id         String    @id\n  identifier String\n  value      String\n  expiresAt  DateTime\n  createdAt  DateTime?\n  updatedAt  DateTime?\n\n  @@map(\"verification\")\n}\n\nmodel CheckoutSessions {\n  id          String   @id\n  userId      String\n  user        User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  sessionId   String\n  paymentType String\n  completed   String\n  cart        String\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n}\n\nmodel Orders {\n  id              String   @id\n  userId          String\n  user            User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  stripeSessionId String?\n  status          String\n  cart            String\n  trackingNumber  String?\n  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())\n\n  MizanTv MizanTv[]\n}\n\nmodel MizanTv {\n  id         String @id\n  userId     String\n  user       User   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  orderId    String\n  order      Orders @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  accessCode String\n}\n\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Theme {\n  id       String @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId String\n  masjid   Masjid @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  name       String\n  configJson Json // stores layout/colors/etc.\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n\n  devices Device[]\n}\n\nmodel PrayerTime {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  date        DateTime\n  fajr        DateTime\n  sunrise     DateTime\n  dhuhr       DateTime\n  asr         DateTime\n  maghrib     DateTime\n  isha        DateTime\n  isCalculated Boolean  @default(true)\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n  month String\n  year Int\n\n  // Relation to Masjid\n  masjid      Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([masjidId])\n  @@index([date])\n  @@unique([masjidId, date])\n}\n\nmodel Flyer {\n  id       String @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId String\n  masjid   Masjid @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  title     String\n  imageUrl  String\n  startTime DateTime\n  endTime   DateTime\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n}\n\nmodel Products {\n  id                     String   @id\n  name                   String\n  description            String\n  features               String[]\n  price                  Int\n  requiredSubscriptionId String\n  popular                Boolean  @default(false)\n  image                  String   @default(\"placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=300\")\n  category               String   @default(\"\")\n  role                   String   @default(\"subscription\")\n  url                    String   @default(\"\")\n}\n\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "model Theme {\n  id       String @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId String\n  masjid   Masjid @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  name       String\n  configJson Json // stores layout/colors/etc.\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n\n  devices Device[]\n}\n\nmodel PrayerTime {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  date        DateTime\n  fajr        DateTime\n  sunrise     DateTime\n  dhuhr       DateTime\n  asr         DateTime\n  maghrib     DateTime\n  isha        DateTime\n  isCalculated Boolean  @default(true)\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n  month String\n  year Int\n\n  // Relation to Masjid\n  masjid      Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([masjidId])\n  @@index([date])\n  @@unique([masjidId, date])\n}\n\nmodel Flyer {\n  id       String @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId String\n  masjid   Masjid @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  title     String\n  imageUrl  String\n  startTime DateTime\n  endTime   DateTime\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n}\n\nmodel Products {\n  id                     String   @id\n  name                   String\n  description            String\n  features               String[]\n  price                  Int\n  requiredSubscriptionId String\n  popular                Boolean  @default(false)\n  image                  String   @default(\"placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=300\")\n  category               String   @default(\"\")\n  role                   String   @default(\"subscription\")\n  url                    String   @default(\"\")\n}\n\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Event {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  title       String\n  date        DateTime\n  timeStart   DateTime\n  timeEnd     DateTime\n  location    String\n  description String\n  type        String   // prayer, education, community, youth, etc.\n  tagColor    String   // blue-500, green-500, purple-500, orange-500, gray-500\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n   \n  // Google Calendar sync fields\n  syncToGoogleCalendar Boolean @default(false)\n  googleCalendarEventId String? // Stores the Google Calendar event ID for two-way sync\n  lastSyncedAt DateTime? // Tracks when the event was last synced with Google Calendar\n  syncStatus String? // Can be 'pending', 'synced', 'failed'\n   \n  masjid      Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([masjidId])\n}\n\nmodel User {\n  id            String    @id\n  name          String\n  email         String\n  emailVerified Boolean\n  image         String?\n  createdAt     DateTime\n  updatedAt     DateTime\n  sessions      Session[]\n  accounts      Account[]\n  masjids       Masjid[]  @relation(\"MasjidUsers\")\n  admin         Boolean   @default(false)\n  role          String    @default(\"user\")\n\n  MyMasjid         Masjid[]\n  CheckoutSessions CheckoutSessions[]\n  Orders           Orders[]\n  MizanTv          MizanTv[]\n\n  stripeCustomerId String?\n\n  @@unique([email])\n  @@map(\"user\")\n}\n\nmodel Session {\n  id        String   @id\n  expiresAt DateTime\n  token     String\n  createdAt DateTime\n  updatedAt DateTime\n  ipAddress String?\n  userAgent String?\n  userId    String\n  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n\n  @@unique([token])\n  @@map(\"session\")\n}\n\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "model Event {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  title       String\n  date        DateTime\n  timeStart   DateTime\n  timeEnd     DateTime\n  location    String\n  description String\n  type        String   // prayer, education, community, youth, etc.\n  tagColor    String   // blue-500, green-500, purple-500, orange-500, gray-500\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n   \n  // Google Calendar sync fields\n  syncToGoogleCalendar Boolean @default(false)\n  googleCalendarEventId String? // Stores the Google Calendar event ID for two-way sync\n  lastSyncedAt DateTime? // Tracks when the event was last synced with Google Calendar\n  syncStatus String? // Can be 'pending', 'synced', 'failed'\n   \n  masjid      Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id])\n\n  @@index([masjidId])\n}\n\nmodel User {\n  id            String    @id\n  name          String\n  email         String\n  emailVerified Boolean\n  image         String?\n  createdAt     DateTime\n  updatedAt     DateTime\n  sessions      Session[]\n  accounts      Account[]\n  masjids       Masjid[]  @relation(\"MasjidUsers\")\n  admin         Boolean   @default(false)\n  role          String    @default(\"user\")\n\n  MyMasjid         Masjid[]\n  CheckoutSessions CheckoutSessions[]\n  Orders           Orders[]\n  MizanTv          MizanTv[]\n\n  stripeCustomerId String?\n\n  @@unique([email])\n  @@map(\"user\")\n}\n\nmodel Session {\n  id        String   @id\n  expiresAt DateTime\n  token     String\n  createdAt DateTime\n  updatedAt DateTime\n  ipAddress String?\n  userAgent String?\n  userId    String\n  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n\n  @@unique([token])\n  @@map(\"session\")\n}\n\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { auth } from \"./auth\";\nimport { prisma } from \"./db\";\n\n\nexport async function loginUser({\n  email,\n  password,\n  rememberMe\n}: {\n    email: string,\n    password: string,\n    rememberMe: boolean\n}) {\n  try {\n    const user = await auth.api.signInEmail({\n      body: {\n        email,\n        password\n      },\n    });\n    return user;\n  } catch (err) {\n    return err;\n  }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"use server\";"

          },

            "lineNumber": 16,

        "originalContents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { auth } from \"./auth\";\nimport { prisma } from \"./db\";\n\n\nexport async function loginUser({\n  email,\n  password,\n  rememberMe\n}: {\n    email: string,\n    password: string,\n    rememberMe: boolean\n}) {\n  try {\n    const user = await auth.api.signInEmail({\n      body: {\n        email,\n        password\n      },\n    });\n    return user;\n  } catch (err) {\n    return err;\n  }\n}",

        "contents": "model PrayerCalculation {\n  id                   String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId             String\n  masjid               Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  calculationMethod    String   // ISNA, MWL, Karachi, Makkah, Egypt, Custom\n  asrMethod            String   // Standard, Hanafi\n  higherLatitudeMethod String   // None, MiddleOfNight, SeventhOfNight, TwilightAngle\n  fajrOffset           Int\n  sunriseOffset        Int\n  dhuhrOffset          Int\n  asrOffset            Int\n  maghribOffset        Int\n  ishaOffset           Int\n  createdAt            DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt            DateTime @updatedAt @default(now())\n}\n\nmodel IqamahTiming {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  masjid      Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  changeDate  DateTime\n  fajr        String\n  dhuhr       String\n  asr         String\n  maghrib     String\n  maghribType String\n  maghribOffset String\n  isha        String\n  jumuahI     String?\n  jumuahII    String?\n  jumuahIII   String?\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n}\n",

        "originalContents": "model PrayerCalculation {\n  id                   String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId             String\n  masjid               Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  calculationMethod    String   // ISNA, MWL, Karachi, Makkah, Egypt, Custom\n  asrMethod            String   // Standard, Hanafi\n  higherLatitudeMethod String   // None, MiddleOfNight, SeventhOfNight, TwilightAngle\n  fajrOffset           Int\n  sunriseOffset        Int\n  dhuhrOffset          Int\n  asrOffset            Int\n  maghribOffset        Int\n  ishaOffset           Int\n  createdAt            DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt            DateTime @updatedAt @default(now())\n}\n\nmodel IqamahTiming {\n  id          String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  masjid      Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  changeDate  DateTime\n  fajr        String\n  dhuhr       String\n  asr         String\n  maghrib     String\n  maghribType String\n  maghribOffset String\n  isha        String\n  jumuahI     String?\n  jumuahII    String?\n  jumuahIII   String?\n  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt\n}\n",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use server\";\nimport { auth } from \"../auth\";\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\";\nimport { headers } from \"next/headers\";\n\nexport const getUser = async () =\u003e {\n  const session = await auth.api.getSession({\n    headers: await headers()\n  });\n  if(!session || !session.session) return null; \n  const user = await prisma.user.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      id: session.user.id\n    },\n    include: {\n      sessions: true\n    }\n  });\n  return user;\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"use server\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "import { auth } from \"../auth\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import { prisma } from \"../db\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import { headers } from \"next/headers\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "export const getUser = async () =\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "  const session = await auth.api.getSession({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    headers: await headers()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "  });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "  if(!session || !session.session) return null; "
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "  const user = await prisma.user.findFirst({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    where: {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "      id: session.user.id"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    include: {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "      sessions: true"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "  });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "  return user;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\"use server\";\nimport { auth } from \"../auth\";\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\";\nimport { headers } from \"next/headers\";\n\nexport const getUser = async () =\u003e {\n  const session = await auth.api.getSession({\n    headers: await headers()\n  });\n  if(!session || !session.session) return null; \n  const user = await prisma.user.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      id: session.user.id\n    },\n    include: {\n      sessions: true\n    }\n  });\n  return user;\n}",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\"\nimport { zodResolver } from \"@hookform/resolvers/zod\"\nimport { useForm } from \"react-hook-form\"\nimport type { z } from \"zod\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Form, FormControl, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel } from \"@/components/ui/form\"\nimport { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from \"@/components/ui/select\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\"\nimport { iqamahTimingSchema } from \"@/lib/models/iqamah-timings\"\nimport { addIqamahTiming } from \"@/lib/actions/prayer-times\"\nimport { TimeInput } from \"@/components/ui/time-input\"\nimport { MaghribInput } from \"@/components/ui/maghrib-input\"\nimport { DatePicker } from \"@/components/ui/date-picker\"\nimport { CalendarDatePicker } from \"@/components/ui/calendar-date-picker\"\nimport { IqamahTiming } from \"@prisma/client\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\n\ntype AddIqamahTimingFormProps = {\n  masjidId: string;\n  lastIqamah: IqamahTiming | null;\n  onSuccess?: () =\u003e void\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use server\"\n\nimport { revalidatePath } from \"next/cache\"\nimport { z } from \"zod\"\nimport { iqamahTimingSchema, iqamahTimingSchemaAPI, prayerCalculationSchema } from \"../models/iqamah-timings\"\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\"\nimport { CalculationMethod, Coordinates, Madhab, PrayerTimes } from \"adhan\"\nimport moment from \"moment\";\n\n\nasync function savePrayerCalculationSettings(data: any, masjidId: string) {\n  const update = await prisma.prayerCalculation.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n    },\n  })\n\n  if (!update) {\n    const prayerCalculation = await prisma.prayerCalculation.create({\n      data: {\n        ...data,\n        masjidId,\n      },\n    })\n    return prayerCalculation\n  } else {\n    const prayerCalculation = await prisma.prayerCalculation.update({\n      where: {\n        id: update.id,\n      },\n      data: data,\n    })\n    return prayerCalculation\n  }\n}",

        "originalContents": "\"use server\"\n\nimport { revalidatePath } from \"next/cache\"\nimport { z } from \"zod\"\nimport { iqamahTimingSchema, iqamahTimingSchemaAPI, prayerCalculationSchema } from \"../models/iqamah-timings\"\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\"\nimport { CalculationMethod, Coordinates, Madhab, PrayerTimes } from \"adhan\"\nimport moment from \"moment\";\n\n\nasync function savePrayerCalculationSettings(data: any, masjidId: string) {\n  const update = await prisma.prayerCalculation.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n    },\n  })\n\n  if (!update) {\n    const prayerCalculation = await prisma.prayerCalculation.create({\n      data: {\n        ...data,\n        masjidId,\n      },\n    })\n    return prayerCalculation\n  } else {\n    const prayerCalculation = await prisma.prayerCalculation.update({\n      where: {\n        id: update.id,\n      },\n      data: data,\n    })\n    return prayerCalculation\n  }\n}",

        "contents": "export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {\n...\nexport async function POST(request: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n\n    ...\n\n    if (validationErrors.length \u003e 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        {\n          success: false,\n          error: \"Validation errors in CSV data\",\n          details: validationErrors,\n        },\n        { status: 400 },\n      )\n    }\n\n    // Insert valid data into the database\n    const validData = validationResults.filter((result: any) =\u003e result.success).map((result: any) =\u003e result.data)\n\n    const result = await prisma.iqamahTiming.createMany({\n      data: validData,\n      skipDuplicates: true,\n    })\n\n    // Revalidate the prayer times page\n    revalidatePath(\"/dashboard/prayer-times\")\n\n    return NextResponse.json({\n      success: true,\n      message: &#96;Successfully imported ${result.count} Iqamah timings&#96;,\n      count: result.count,\n    })\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error uploading Iqamah timings:\", error)\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: false, error: \"Failed to process CSV upload\" }, { status: 500 })\n  }\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n    if (validationErrors.length \u003e 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        {\n          success: false,\n          error: \"Validation errors in CSV data\",\n          details: validationErrors,\n        },\n        { status: 400 },\n      )\n    }\n\n    // Insert valid data into the database\n    const validData = validationResults.filter((result: any) =\u003e result.success).map((result: any) =\u003e result.data)\n\n    const result = await prisma.iqamahTiming.createMany({\n      data: validData,\n      skipDuplicates: true,\n    })\n\n    // Revalidate the prayer times page\n    revalidatePath(\"/dashboard/prayer-times\")\n\n    return NextResponse.json({\n      success: true,\n      message: &#96;Successfully imported ${result.count} Iqamah timings&#96;,\n      count: result.count,\n    })\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error uploading Iqamah timings:\", error)\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: false, error: \"Failed to process CSV upload\" }, { status: 500 })\n  }\n}",

        "contents": "\n\nexport async function getMonthPrayerTimes({\n  month,\n  year,\n  masjidId\n}: {\n    month: number;\n    year: number;\n    masjidId: string;\n}) {\n  const prayerTimes = await prisma.prayerTime.findMany({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n      month: String(month),\n      year\n    },\n    orderBy: {\n      date: \"asc\"\n    }\n  });\n\n  return prayerTimes || [];\n}",

        "contents": "\n\nasync function getPrayerCalculationSettings(masjidId: string) {\n  const prayerCalculation = await prisma.prayerCalculation.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      masjidId,\n    },\n  })\n  return (\n    prayerCalculation || {\n      id: \"calc-1\",\n      masjidId,\n      calculationMethod: \"ISNA\",\n      asrMethod: \"Standard\",\n      higherLatitudeMethod: \"None\",\n      fajrOffset: 0,\n      sunriseOffset: 0,\n      dhuhrOffset: 0,\n      asrOffset: 0,\n      maghribOffset: 0,\n      ishaOffset: 0,\n    }\n  )\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\";\nimport { stripeClient } from \"../stripe\";\n\nexport const getSessionAndOrder = async (sessionId: string) =\u003e {\n  const checkoutSession = await prisma.checkoutSessions.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      sessionId\n    },\n    include: {\n      user: true\n    }\n  });\n  const order = await prisma.orders.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      stripeSessionId: sessionId\n    }\n  });\n  const stripeSession = await stripeClient.checkout.sessions.retrieve(checkoutSession?.sessionId);\n\n  return {\n    order,\n    checkoutSession,\n    stripeSession: stripeSession ? {\n      amount_total: stripeSession.amount_total,\n      created: stripeSession.created\n    } : null\n  };\n}",

        "originalContents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\";\nimport { stripeClient } from \"../stripe\";\n\nexport const getSessionAndOrder = async (sessionId: string) =\u003e {\n  const checkoutSession = await prisma.checkoutSessions.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      sessionId\n    },\n    include: {\n      user: true\n    }\n  });\n  const order = await prisma.orders.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      stripeSessionId: sessionId\n    }\n  });\n  const stripeSession = await stripeClient.checkout.sessions.retrieve(checkoutSession?.sessionId);\n\n  return {\n    order,\n    checkoutSession,\n    stripeSession: stripeSession ? {\n      amount_total: stripeSession.amount_total,\n      created: stripeSession.created\n    } : null\n  };\n}",
```

Now let's create the Google Calendar OAuth API endpoint:


_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file** • Edit file: app/api/google/calendar/auth/route.ts</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 86, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,86 @@
- 
+ import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
+ import { google } from "googleapis";
+ import { prisma } from "@/lib/db";
+ 
+ const oauth2Client = new google.auth.OAuth2(
+   process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID,
+   process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET,
+   process.env.GOOGLE_REDIRECT_URI
+ );
+ 
+ export async function GET(request: Request) {
+   try {
+     const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
+     const masjidId = searchParams.get("masjidId");
+ 
+     if (!masjidId) {
+       return NextResponse.json(
+         { error: "Masjid ID is required" },
+         { status: 400 }
+       );
+     }
+ 
+     // Generate OAuth URL
+     const url = oauth2Client.generateAuthUrl({
+       access_type: "offline",
+       scope: [
+         "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar",
+         "https://www.googleapis.com/auth/calendar.events",
+       ],
+       state: masjidId, // Store masjidId in state for later use
+     });
+ 
+     return NextResponse.json({ url });
+   } catch (error) {
+     console.error("Error generating Google OAuth URL:", error);
+     return NextResponse.json(
+       { error: "Failed to generate OAuth URL" },
+       { status: 500 }
+     );
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ export async function POST(request: Request) {
+   try {
+     const { code, state: masjidId } = await request.json();
+ 
+     if (!code || !masjidId) {
+       return NextResponse.json(
+         { error: "Code and masjidId are required" },
+         { status: 400 }
+       );
+     }
+ 
+     // Exchange code for tokens
+     const { tokens } = await oauth2Client.getToken(code);
+     oauth2Client.setCredentials(tokens);
+ 
+     // Get the calendar ID
+     const calendar = google.calendar({ version: "v3", auth: oauth2Client });
+     const calendarList = await calendar.calendarList.list();
+     const primaryCalendar = calendarList.data.items?.find(
+       (item) =&gt; item.primary
+     );
+ 
+     if (!primaryCalendar?.id) {
+       throw new Error("No primary calendar found");
+     }
+ 
+     // Update masjid with calendar ID and credentials
+     await prisma.masjid.update({
+       where: { id: masjidId },
+       data: {
+         googleCalendarId: primaryCalendar.id,
+         googleCalendarCredentials: tokens,
+       },
+     });
+ 
+     return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
+   } catch (error) {
+     console.error("Error handling Google OAuth callback:", error);
+     return NextResponse.json(
+       { error: "Failed to handle OAuth callback" },
+       { status: 500 }
+     );
+   }
+ } 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file">
